marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Enjoy RVA living in this like new construction Townhome in Manchester!!! You’ll love the easy access to downtown, VCU, Belle Island and just minutes to hot restaurants and breweries like The Veil, Hatch Local, Legends Brewing  &  Iron Clad Pizza! The entry level is finished with a large rec space perfect for a second gathering spot and walks out to the rear yard. On the second/main level you’ll find a fabulous open great room and kitchen/dining area with access to the rear balcony. The bright kitchen was completed with beautiful quartz countertops, white cabinets, and stainless steel appliances. You’ll find the primary bedroom, spacious bath, walk-in closet and two secondary bedrooms on the third floor along with the shared hall bath. Belle Heights is a maintenance free community and offers an onsite dog park and an additional park for their humans!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Situated on a picturesque tree lined street, you will fall in love with this 4 bedroom 4 bath brick home as soon as you arrive. Located in one of the most beautiful neighborhoods in Richmond, houses like this rarely hit the market. The wonderful architecture includes a warm and welcoming foyer that opens to an inviting family room with a brick fireplace, an adjacent bonus space perfect for an office and wood floors throughout. The formal dining room is just off the spacious kitchen for all your entertaining needs. Upstairs you’ll find the primary bedroom suite with full bath and dual closets, and the second and third bedrooms with a shared hall bath. The full basement offers a second living space with a fourth bedroom and additional bath. The fully finished shed has endless options! Separate working space, she/he-shed, studio… anything you can imagine! And a 2 car detached brick garage w/ automatic door and alley access! Enjoy the gorgeous outdoor space on the paver patio or the tiered back deck overlooking the beautifully landscaped fenced rear yard. Enjoy outdoor concerts and Fourth of July Fireworks at Dogwood Dell. Walk to Maymont Park, Carytown, and public dog park. Close proximity to all Richmond has to offer, interstates, and so much more. This home is a true beauty.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Well maintained and updated brick colonial for fabulous family living! Home boasts 4 bedrooms and 3 full and 1 half baths. The kitchen has been totally redone with granite counter tops and stainless steel appliances. It has an island and loads of pantry space. The living room and dining room are formal with wonderful moulding. A cozy office off the living room complete the first level. Second level has Primary bedroom with private full bath, 2 other bedrooms and a hall bath. All bathrooms have been updated with new fixtures and granite counters. The finished basement has flex/family room, bedroom #4 ( no closet) and a full bath with walk in shower. You must see the backyard to appreciate! The fenced rear yard has fabulous deck and brick walkways leading to side yards and to 2 car detached garage. LOCATION AND QUALITY best describe this wonderful home near the Carillon and Maymont Park!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to your opportunity to own a piece of the vibrant Museum District of Richmond, VA! This charming 3-bedroom, 1-bath end unit rowhouse boasts 1274 square feet of potential, nestled in one of the city's most sought-after neighborhoods. Convenience is at your doorstep with this prime location, just minutes away from an array of restaurants, cafes, and grocery stores. Whether you're craving a gourmet meal or picking up essentials for dinner, everything you need is within walking distance. While this home may need a bit of updating, it presents a fantastic chance to customize and create your dream space in one of Richmond's most walkable areas. Imagine the possibilities of transforming this cozy abode into your own personal oasis, reflecting your unique style and taste. With its historic charm and unbeatable location, this rowhouse offers not just a home, but a lifestyle. Don't miss out on this rare opportunity to immerse yourself in the cultural richness and vibrant energy of the Museum District. Make your move today and start living the quintessential Richmond experience!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This charming home seamlessly blends historic allure with contemporary functionality, making it a perfect blend of the old and the new. The kitchen not only provides ample space for dining but also seamlessly connects to the expansive living room. Upstairs, you'll find three cozy bedrooms and a well-appointed full bathroom. The large deck overlooks a generously sized backyard, adding an inviting outdoor space to this already impressive home. Situated in a prime location near Richmond's bustling heart and VCU campus and offering two off street parking spaces, this property offers convenience and accessibility. Book your tour and come take a look!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This stunning and freshly landscaped center hall colonial welcomes you home! The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, gorgeous backsplash, and light cabinetry. Just off the kitchen is the formal dining room which flows into the spacious living room. The main floor also features a cozy den with a beautiful fireplace. From the den you can step out onto your own private patio. Upstairs you will find three bedrooms, including the primary bedroom, which offers a full bathroom with a walk-in shower. The backyard is a true private oasis and offers a spacious deck which overlooks the yard.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This beautiful, newly renovated four square home in Richmond’s historic Brookland Park has all of the modern amenities of a new home but also has the charm and character from the last century. The exterior features original stucco and Buckingham slate roof on the main structure. You are welcomed into the home with a generous foyer and entertaining area that flows into the dining room. Enjoy the newly renovated  kitchen that is full of natural light. The kitchen boasts a substantial island, quartz countertops, a marble backsplash, as well as a large sliding window. The main floor also has an updated powder room with marble flooring and an ample laundry room. The primary bedroom on the second floor offers a generous en suite with floor to ceiling porcelain tile, 3 showerheads, a bench, and a walk-in closet. Two additional bedrooms and another fully renovated bathroom complete the upstairs. Hot water radiant heat, updated plumbing and electrical, new exterior water and gas service lines, as well as a generous real estate tax abatement with 9 years remaining. Don’t wait to come visit your future home, as this one will not last long.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This stunning Museum District home captures the charm of quintessential Richmond coupled with impressive modern elements. The one of a kind kitchen renovation was completed for an entertainer with a culinary flair. From the custom painted glass backsplash to the shelving and storage, no detail was left unnoticed. The primary bath addition included an oversized shower/ tub, dual vanity, motion controlled lights and a Bluetooth vent fan/speaker. Enjoy beautiful spring mornings on the recent front porch addition and your evenings under the pergola in the private rear courtyard. Any buyer with an appreciation for technology will enjoy the whole home connectivity. From the Nest system and voice controlled ceiling fans to the electric car charger in your private parking space at the rear of the property. The well thought elements in this home are extensive and best appreciated in person. The separate lot located behind the home is also available.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Dynamite property in the Museum District! The beautiful bricked front porch area takes you inside where a large foyer leads you into a double sized living room with two fireplaces, large dining room with painted wood panels and brick accent wall and well-equipped, eat-in kitchen with an overabundance of cabinets, solid-surface countertops, laundry and pantry, and there's also a full bath on this floor. Upstairs are four large bedrooms with unusually large closets - the master has three of them!  There are two wide storage closets on the hall with shelves and a spacious full bath. There are both front and back staircases and the partial basement can be accessed from inside or from outside. Step down from the wide, brick, deck-sized back porch onto a lovely brick patio with built-in planters all around, beyond which is a separate deep fenced lot which is also available for an additional $30,000. (City of Richmond TAX id # W0001410065) This fantastic home is a "must see"!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to River Mill! This stunning home, built less than a year ago, showcases a contemporary design inside and out. The inviting front porch and modern front door lead into a bright foyer, which opens to a guest bedroom or study with an adjacent full bath. The open-concept layout seamlessly connects the family room, featuring an offset fireplace, with the kitchen and breakfast nook. A spacious screened porch extends off the family room, perfect for entertaining, enjoying cool fall evenings, or dining al fresco style. The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, glistening quartz countertops, and elegant cabinetry. A tucked-away mudroom with built-in storage leads to the generous two-car garage. The sleek design stairway creates an open feel that flows throughout the home, making the space feel bright and airy. Upstairs, two bedrooms share a Jack-and-Jill bath, while another large bedroom features its own en suite bath. Relax in the luxurious primary suite complete with a spacious walk-in closet, a standalone soaking tub, and a walk-in shower. The unfinished third floor, which includes plumbing rough-in for an additional bath, offers countless possibilities including playroom, media room, gym, personal library, art studio, or even a private relaxation space. The community offers outstanding amenities, including a clubhouse, patio, playground, trails and sidewalks, a pool, an amphitheater, Mill Square Park, the Chickahominy River Nature Trail, Big Meadow Park, and Glover Park. In close proximity to a variety of restaurants, James River Cellars Winery, museums, Target, and so much more. Schedule your tour today to see everything this amazing property has to offer!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to River Mill! This stunning home, built less than a year ago, showcases a contemporary design inside and out. The inviting front porch and modern front door lead into a bright foyer, which opens to a guest bedroom or study with an adjacent full bath. The open-concept layout seamlessly connects the family room, featuring an offset fireplace, with the kitchen and breakfast nook. A spacious screened porch extends off the family room, perfect for entertaining, enjoying cool fall evenings, or dining al fresco style. The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, glistening quartz countertops, and elegant cabinetry. A tucked-away mudroom with built-in storage leads to the generous two-car garage. The sleek design stairway creates an open feel that flows throughout the home, making the space feel bright and airy. Upstairs, two bedrooms share a Jack-and-Jill bath, while another large bedroom features its own en suite bath. Relax in the luxurious primary suite complete with a spacious walk-in closet, a standalone soaking tub, and a walk-in shower. The unfinished third floor, which includes plumbing rough-in for an additional bath, offers countless possibilities including playroom, media room, gym, personal library, art studio, or even a private relaxation space. The community offers outstanding amenities, including a clubhouse, patio, playground, trails and sidewalks, a pool, an amphitheater, Mill Square Park, the Chickahominy River Nature Trail, Big Meadow Park, and Glover Park. In close proximity to a variety of restaurants, James River Cellars Winery, museums, Target, and so much more. Schedule your tour today to see everything this amazing property has to offer!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to a home where modern design and classic charm come together effortlessly. This beautifully updated property features a fully renovated kitchen with sleek quartz countertops, all-new cabinetry, stylish hardware, and a functional layout that makes everyday living and entertaining a breeze. The re-designed bathroom offers a fresh, contemporary look, while fresh paint throughout the home enhances its bright and inviting atmosphere. Natural light pours into every room, highlighting the warmth of the gleaming hardwood floors that flow throughout the main living spaces. Outside, you’ll love the great curb appeal and detached storage shed, offering valuable space for tools, hobbies, or seasonal storage. Whether you’re buying your first home or adding to your investment portfolio, this well-maintained gem offers incredible opportunity in a convenient Henrico location—blending comfort, style, and lasting value.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Experience the charm of this meticulously maintained 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom townhouse, boasting an impressive 2000 square feet of living space with new flooring through out. Nestled in the desirable Glen Allen area, this home offers an inviting open layout on the main level, creating an ideal space for entertaining guests or relaxing with family. On the main level, you'll find the primary bedroom featuring an attached full bathroom complete with a large tub, providing a comfortable and private retreat. Ascend to the second floor to discover two additional bedrooms, ensuring ample space for family members or guests. The bonus loft space offers versatility, serving as an ideal office area or a cozy reading nook. Step outside into the fully fenced backyard, where a spacious deck awaits, overlooking the meticulously manicured yard. Don't miss out on the opportunity to tour this hidden gem and discover the perfect blend of comfort, style, and functionality it has to offer.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This stunning and meticulously maintained 4 bedroom, 3 bath home in the highly sought after Kings Forest community of Glen Allen welcomes you home. Fully updated within the past year this home offers a turn key opportunity in the heart of Glen Allen. The kitchen boasts updated flooring ('21), newer cabinets ('16), recessed lighting, stainless steel appliances, granite counters, as well as a breakfast nook surrounded by windows, bringing an abundance of natural light throughout the space. The kitchen flows into the spacious living room, which offers recessed lighting, a ceiling fan, as well as a fireplace. The main level also features a formal dining room, a half bath, as well as an additional living room. Traveling upstairs you will find 4 bedrooms, including the primary bedroom, which offers dual closets, as well as a recently updated full bathroom with a dual sink vanity, walk-in shower, and a soaking tub. The backyard is an entertainer's dream, offering a recently updated spacious deck overlooking the full fenced rear yard. Other recent upgrades and improvements include new downstairs windows ('15), lower HVAC ('15), and an updated hall bathroom ('16). Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Ready for quick Move-In! Open floorplan with lot of natural light. 9' ceiling on both 1st  &  2nd floor. The home offers 4 bedrooms with 3 full baths, hardwood flooring on the first floor with granite counter tops in kitchen with eat in nook area. The home boast formal living and dining areas with 2-story foyer. Surround sound in the over sized family room. The master suite features a huge walk-in closet and a luxury master bath with tile floor, separate shower, double vanities, jetted tub, and separate water closet. All the baths has raised vanity. Upgraded 2nd floor HVAC to support future 3rd floor. Sheet Rock is already there in the attic ready to install. Whole house freshly painted  &  carpet steam cleaned. The exterior of this great home is low-maintenance vinyl, aggregate driveway, side entry garage and freshly stained rear deck that looks into a private wooded area.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Meticulously maintained, low maintenance living with community amenities within the city limits. This charming 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom condo in the sought-after Lock Lanes Condominiums of Richmond welcomes you home. Located on the second floor and with unobstructed views on all three sides of the space to allow plenty of natural light throughout. Enter and notice the thoughtfully curated and whimsical lighting and fan fixtures from LaDiff in the main living and bedroom areas as well as the custom plantation shutters throughout. The kitchen boasts dark cabinetry, stainless steel appliances (w/ gas cooking) and a separate access door to the courtyard staircase. The Primary Bedroom offers an en-suite bath with walk in shower while the second full bath, with tub and shower combination stands unattached for guests and for the second bedroom. Just a short commute from most major locations you are not going to want to miss your chance at this truly rare find of such a well maintained and cared for condo. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This charming 4 bedroom, 3 bath split foyer in the sought-after North Run Estates community of Henrico welcomes you home. Upon entering the house you will come to appreciate the abundance of natural light aerating throughout the main level. The kitchen offers stainless steel appliances and opens up to the separate, formal dining room. The kitchen also opens up to a beautiful sunroom that offers direct access to the private deck. Just down the hall you will find three bedrooms, including the primary bedroom, which offers a full bathroom. Downstairs you will find an additional bedroom with an adjacent bathroom, perfect for an in-law suite. The lower level also features a spacious and inviting family room with a beautiful stone fireplace. The lower level family room opens up directly to the rear, private patio. New deck, several upgrades, and move-in ready!  Come tour this home -- and see for yourself !

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This charming Colonial in the Far West End offers convenience to retail with the bonus of not being in an Association. This well maintained 3 bedroom, 2.5 bath is ready for you to make it your own in the new year. Located on the end of a cul-de-sac street and offering a large, fenced in back yard, this home offers plenty of privacy for entertaining friends or enjoying family. The main level offers a formal dining room and spacious living room with gas fireplace and access to the rear deck. The kitchen boasts  new granite countertops with a center island, pantry and laundry/utility room located directly off of the kitchen. Upstairs you will find 3 bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms. The Primary Bedroom features a full en-suite bathroom with a large walk in closet. The second and third bedrooms offer plenty of space and share the second full bathroom upstairs. The backyard features a spacious deck overlooking the fenced in yard, the perfect spot to relax in the evening or entertain friends. Come tour!

This well maintained 2-bed, 2.5-bath condo offers a fantastic opportunity for comfortable and low-maintenance living. Don't miss out on this opportunity to experience a simplified lifestyle in a prime location. Embrace the comfort, convenience, and maintenance-free living offered by this West End Condo. Book your tour today.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Introducing a unique opportunity to own a 3 bedroom, 2 and a half bathroom home with 1,572 square feet in the highly desired Deep Run school district of Henrico, Virginia. This property is priced below full market value but has the potential to be a charming home in a sought-after location. The home features a spacious living room, a separate dining room, and a kitchen with ample cabinet space. The bedrooms are all located on the second floor, providing privacy and separation from the main living area. The primary bedroom includes an en-suite bathroom and a walk-in closet. While the home is in need of some cosmetic updates, it presents a unique opportunity to personalize and design a home to fit your taste and style. With some vision and creativity, this property has the potential to become a beautiful home. The location of this home provides access to some of the best schools in Henrico County as well as convenience to retail and short commute times. Don't miss out on this rare opportunity to own a home in a highly desired location at an affordable price. Schedule a showing today and explore the potential this property has to offer.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 310 N Foxhill Rd in Richmond, VA—a beautifully maintained home offering comfort, style, and convenience. Step inside to discover gleaming wood floors that flow throughout the living spaces, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The kitchen is a standout feature—everything in the kitchen is new, including modern cabinetry, shining appliances, and a spacious island complete with a breakfast bar—perfect for casual dining or entertaining. Fresh paint, updated interior lighting, and exterior landscaping enhance the home’s appeal, while the little mud room/laundry room in the back serves as a perfect drop zone or even a cozy office space. Everyday essentials and popular destinations such as Target, Planet Fitness, Walmart, Chick-fil-A, and more are just minutes away, ensuring your needs are always within reach. Hidden Creek Park  &  Recreation Center is less than 2.5 miles away and offers playgrounds, trails, fields for sports, and tennis courts. This charming property blends modern touches with a prime location, offering an excellent opportunity for today’s homebuyer.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This beautiful two-story transitional in Chappell Ridge won’t disappoint! If space is what you’re looking for, this is it! Inside you’ll find gleaming hardwood floors throughout the main level with a bright and inviting kitchen that opens to the impressive vaulted great room and breakfast nook designed for entertaining! On the second floor, the main primary suite is complete with dual walk-in closets, a spacious ensuite bath with dual vanities, sunken tub and a huge walk-in shower. All of the secondary bedrooms offer ample space including the second primary suite. The third floor bonus room is perfect for a theater or rec room and has access to the large walk-in storage area. The entertaining continues outside as you enjoy the covered deck, beautifully landscaped backyard and concrete patio perfect for nights around the firepit!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Don’t miss this beautiful home located in Chappell Ridge at Wyndham Forest. This two story transitional offers everything you might want. Enjoy the outside comfort of the front porch, rear covered rear porch and the concrete patio overlooking the well landscaped rear fenced yard. The first floor offers hardwood floors throughout, and formal dining and living rooms. The large kitchen offers granite counters, recessed lights, stainless steel appliances, and huge island to entertain around. The morning room off the kitchen offers more ample space for family dinners. The two story family room is stunning with a gas fireplace, built in cabinets, hardwood floors, and rear staircase to second floor. The office also has french doors, recessed lights, and moldings. The second floor has new carpet throughout. The upstairs offers a big master with his/her closets, crown, fan, and remodeled master bath with walk in shower. There is also a second master suite with attached bath and double closets. Don’t miss the huge third floor rec room.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: You will love this adorable rancher nestled in an incredible location. Convenient to Richmond's best dining, shopping, entertainment and the river. You will feel at home the second you walk in! Gleaming with charm throughout, the family room flows to the formal dining, making the space warm and inviting. The updated kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances and quartz countertops. Spend your summer nights in the large, private, fenced back yard entertaining on the deck or patio. The bathroom was renovated in 2023 and the HVAC is only two years old. Minutes from The Wetlands, Pony Pasture, Carytown, Scott’s Addition, and Stony Point this home puts you minutes from everything!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Beautiful brick front 6 bedroom home in the sought after Deep Run district!  Very large open kitchen/family/eating area with great lighting. Formal dining with tray ceiling and an additional room on the first floor that would also make a spacious office. Powder room on the first floor has been beautifully updated. On the 2nd floor there are 5 bedrooms and 2 full updated bathrooms. The 3rd floor has been finished to include an additional bedroom and full bathroom. 2 car garage and fenced in backyard. Twin Hickory neighborhood offers pool, tennis, and clubhouse! First floor HVAC replaced in 2021, 2nd and 3rd floor HVAC replaced in 2018. Water heater is 3 years old.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Move-in ready brick-front home w/ an enticing open floor plan starting in the eat-in kitchen and family room featuring granite counters, tile backsplash, stainless appliances, fireplace and walls of windows in eat-in area w/ access to back deck and yard. Welcoming 2-story foyer flows to living and dining rooms all w/ hrdwd floors! Home offers great space for entertaining and growing families! 5 bdrms on 2nd floor including spacious master w/ sitting area in walkout bay, his and her WI closets and spa bath w/ jetted tub, shower and dbl vanity. Expansion possibilities in the walk-up attic. 1st flr laundry, 2 car garage and paved driveway. Lovingly maintained home has so much to offer! Don't miss your opportunity to live in premium Harvest Glen at Twin Hickory w/ assoc. pool, tennis and clubhouse!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 1512 Wallace St! Located within a mile of VCU, this home features a cozy front porch that’s perfect for your fall decorations. Step inside to an open-concept living space with beautiful vinyl flooring throughout. The kitchen offers a brand-new refrigerator along with stainless steel appliances, including a gas stove, dishwasher, and microwave. The primary bedroom includes an ensuite bathroom with dual sinks and ample storage. Additional highlights include an attached utility room, a rear driveway, a back patio, and a low-maintenance yard. Nestled near the heart of VCU, enjoy getting to Cary Street Field, Monroe Park, and all of VCU's learning Halls in just minutes. Also, you're close to a variety of dining options on and off campus, farmers markets, Petronius S. Jones Park, and more. Schedule your tour today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Upgrades, Upgrades, Upgrades!! This is the one you have been waiting for. Tucked in a Cul-De-Sac, in North Chesterfield. This home offers 4 bedrooms, 2 ½ Baths and over 3000 square feet of living space. The first things you’ll notice when you walk through the door are the two story foyer and beautiful engineered hardwood floors. The first floor offers an office, formal dining room, and open a living room with a gas fireplace. The eat in kitchen is well equipped with custom cabinets with soft close and roll out drawers. Granite counter tops, an island with built in cabinets and stainless steel appliances. Upstairs are the 4 bedrooms. The primary bedroom has a walk in closet, and full bath with a soaking tub, shower and double vanity. Wait there’s more! The 3rd floor has been finished and can be used as a bonus room or rec room. Outside you will find a 12x20 deck in the back yard. Call now to schedule a visit. This one won’t last!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Looking for BETTER THAN NEW CONSTRUCTION, but don't want to wait? This amazing "like new"  home with many upgrades is move in ready  &  waiting for you. Enter into the TWO STORY FOYER with beautiful engineered hardwood floors! The Living Room area has hardwoods  &  could double as an office/study. The Formal Dining Room has hardwoods, trey ceiling, &  chandelier. The DR leads to a Butlers Pantry  &  into the GORGEOUS KITCHEN with stunning granite counter tops! The Sellers concentrated on a GOURMET KITCHEN  &  it shows! CUSTOM CABINETS FEATURE SOFT CLOSE , ROLL OUT DRAWERS, &  GAS COOKING. The HUGE ISLAND provides a wonderful place to entertain  &  cook!. An eat-in kitchen area  &  SPACIOUS FAMILY ROOM WITH GAS FIREPLACE opens to the kitchen. A half bath completes the downstairs. Upstairs find 4 BRs , a huge Master with walk-in closet, bath with soaking tub, shower  &  double vanity! The 3rd BR is over sized, has 2 closets  &  could easily double as a bonus room/2nd FR. Next find a WALK UP 3 RD FLOOR with tons of attic storage  &  potential for finishing. Outdoors a 12X20 deck in the backyard, side entrance garage, expanded paved driveway plus irrigation in front  &  side yards. CUL-DE-SAC LOCATION!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: MOTIVATED SELLER AND PRICE NEGOTIABLE!!! This is a great investor or first time home buyer opportunity. .. home feature 3 bedroom and 1.5 bathrooms but need some TLC. Offers a large back yard with shed and also fenced in. Orginal wood floors are in all bedrooms, living room and dining room. On the 3rd level is a family room, laundry room and separate storage room. Fresh new paint in living room and the small hole in the kitchen ceiling is from the exhaust pipe on the roof that need sealant. House "Sold AS-IS", inspections are welcome, but seller will not make any repairs. Also included in the home and will remain although no known defects is a TV, refrigerators (2), freezer, washer, recliner, chairs(2), table and cabinets (2). Fireplace, chimney, flue all convey "as is".

This is a great investor or first time home buyer opportunity. .. home feature 3 bedroom and 1.5 bathrooms but need some TLC. Offers a large back yard with shed and also fenced in. Orginal wood floors are in all bedrooms, living room and dining room. On the 3rd level is a family room, laundry room and separate storage room. Fresh new paint in living room and the small hole in the kitchen ceiling is from the exhaust pipe on the roof that need sealant. House "Sold AS-IS", inspections are welcome, but seller will not make any repairs. Also included in the home and will remain although no known defects is a TV, refrigerators (2), freezer, washer, recliner, chairs(2), table and cabinets (2). Fireplace, chimney, flue all convey "as is".

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this large 5 bedrooms and 3 ½ baths home. Offering 2450 square feet and sitting on over a half-acre lot. This home is what you have been waiting for. The owner has been updating the home with the following: New Roof 2022, HVAC 2017, Recently Painted 2021, New Patio and landscaping 2022, Newer light fixtures 2020, and Newer LVP Flooring throughout. The kitchen offers plenty of cabinets, countertop space, stainless steel appliances, and a bay window. Formal dining room and great room are perfect for entertaining, and family enjoyment. Upstairs you’ll find the Primary Bedroom with attached huge bath, and walk in closet. 3 other generous sized Bedrooms, and huge 5th bedroom with attached full bath. You will enjoy mornings on the full front porch and evenings in the back on the deck. The back yard is fenced and offers a patio and shed.

Oversized 2 car garage. Two zoned heating and air. The second level boasts the master bedroom with ensuite bath, 4 additional bedrooms and 2 additional full baths. Upstairs laundry. One year home warranty included! Simply move in!  Schedule your showing today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Step into the warmth and timeless appeal of 2301 Essex Road, where classic brick architecture meets thoughtful modern updates. From the moment you enter, you’re welcomed into a spacious, light-filled layout designed for both everyday living and memorable gatherings. The heart of the home—the stunning kitchen—boasts sleek quartz countertops, ample cabinetry, and abundant natural light that spills into the adjoining Florida room. This versatile space is perfect for morning coffee, quiet afternoons with a book, or lively evenings with friends. Picture cozy nights by the glow of the fireplace in the main living room, and even more space to unwind or entertain in the finished basement, complete with a second fireplace. Both bathrooms have been stylishly updated with fresh, contemporary tile work, adding just the right touch of modern luxury. Situated on a generous corner lot, the property also features a detached two-car garage offering plenty of storage. Conveniently close to Bryan Park, shopping, dining, and more, this home invites you to settle in, stretch out, and make it your own.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: YOUR SEARCH IS OVER!! This home has been well maintained by the original owner. It has three spacious bedrooms and two and a half baths. As soon as you walk through the front door, you'll notice the open floor plan. Great for entertaining and family gatherings. The kitchen has granite countertops, an island big enough for barstools, where you can sit and enjoy countless mealtime conversations. There is also a dining room which is open to the kitchen. The back yard is fully fenced in ready for spring time festivities. Upstairs you will find the primary bedroom suite with a full bath and walk in closet. Two other spacious bedrooms and another full bath. Doing laundry in this home will be a breeze with the laundry room on the second floor.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Locke Lane is one of the most desirable communities in the Near West End. This incredibly charming and immaculately maintained 2nd floor corner unit overlooking the pool is an opportunity not to be missed. You will notice the custom plantation shutters and beautiful hardwood floors throughout the home. The updated kitchen has granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, gas cooking, under cabinet lighting, tile flooring, and a second interior entrance for your convenience. The relaxing primary bedroom has a bright and updated private bath. The community amenities include a pool, picnic area/courtyard with grilling area, fitness center, and ample parking for you and your guests. Lock Lane’s location also puts you within minutes to all the dining, shopping and entertainment in Carytown and down Libbie/Grove and Patterson.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This well-appointed 3 bedroom, 2.5 colonial in the sought-after Woodfield community of Richmond welcomes you home! The kitchen boasts light cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, and a center island with an overhang for barstools. Enjoy your breakfast in the morning in the cozy breakfast nook surrounded by windows! The kitchen flows into the spacious living room which offers direct access to the rear deck. Just off the kitchen you will also find the formal dining room. Traveling upstairs you will find three bedrooms, including the primary bedroom, which offers dual closets, as well as a full bathroom with a dual sink vanity and a tub. The well-manicured and fully fenced rear yard is perfect for entertaining. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This well-maintained 3 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom townhouse in the always desirable Laurel Lakes community of Henrico welcomes you home! Stepping inside you will first notice the spacious living room and new LVP Flooring throughout the first floor. The living room flows into the kitchen, which offers stainless steel appliances, tile backsplash, and a center island. The washer  &  dryer is located just off of the kitchen as well. Traveling upstairs you will find three bedrooms, including the primary bedroom, which offers a full bathroom with a beautiful walk-in shower. The two remaining upstairs bedrooms share a full bathroom. The fully fenced backyard area offers a spacious deck as well as a detached shed. Both upstairs bathrooms have been recently updated as well as fresh paint throughout and new HVAC unit in 2021. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Discover the epitome of effortless living in this turnkey 3-bed, 2-bath ranch. As you step inside, you'll immediately notice the stunning Luxury Vinyl Plank (LVP) flooring that spans throughout the home, offering both durability and a sleek, contemporary look. The freshly painted interior, awash in natural light, creates a warm and inviting atmosphere. A spacious living room welcomes you inside, setting the tone for comfort and relaxation. The well-appointed kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances and an inviting eat-in area. Three bedrooms down the hall provide private retreats, with the Primary Bedroom offering ample closet space and a convenient half bath. A shared full bathroom serves the other two bedrooms. Outside, a roomy deck promises entertaining delight, while a detached garage with workshop ensure practicality. Step outside, and you'll discover a generous backyard with a detached 2-car garage. This versatile space could easily be converted into an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU), providing a unique opportunity for additional income or a private guest suite. Don't miss out – come tour this gem today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Located in the heart of Twin Hickory, this beautifully maintained transitional home offers 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and a rare attached garage in the desirable Avery Green section. With fresh interior paint throughout, updated lighting, and a flexible floor plan, this home is move-in ready. The first floor features a front living room that can function as a home office or playroom, and an open-concept kitchen and family room. The kitchen has been upgraded with quartz countertops, a tile backsplash, and a new garbage disposal, and flows into a cozy family room with a fireplace and sliding doors to a spacious rear deck. Upstairs, the primary suite includes a walk-in closet and attached full bath, while three additional bedrooms provide plenty of space for family, guests, or hobbies. Additional improvements include a smart Ecobee thermostat, interior sprinkler system, and updated faucets and door hardware. Enjoy all the amenities Twin Hickory offers, including a pool, clubhouse, tennis courts, playgrounds, and scenic trails.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Stop the car! This well maintained transitional home in the heart of Twin Hickory offers 4 bedrooms, 2.5 baths, fresh paint and an attached garage (a rare find in Avery Green) along with award winning Henrico County Schools. The lower level has a private living room that can be closed off to utilize as an office or playroom, a large eat-in kitchen with a pantry and sliding glass door to a huge rear deck, and a family room that is open to the kitchen and has a fireplace. The upper level has a spacious primary suite with attached full bath and walk-in closet. The three other bedrooms are all good sizes. *  * Recent updates include: new roof in 2018 and replaced HVAC (furnace and ac) in 2015 *  * . All this and the amazing Twin Hickory amenities including: pool, clubhouse, tennis courts, play ground, walking paths and more!

FT. ! WON’T LAST LONG!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This beautifully maintained home combines modern comfort with thoughtful upgrades. The semi-open main floor features custom wood shutters throughout, a cozy living room with a natural gas fireplace, and an eat-in kitchen offering ceiling-height cabinets, pantry space, and stainless steel appliances. The spacious primary bedroom includes a walk-in closet, oversized bathtub, and separate shower. The private, shaded backyard is perfect for relaxation or entertaining, with a deck, two custom patios, and a large storage shed. Recent improvements include a new gas stove, refrigerator, dishwasher, updated flooring, paint, and lighting throughout the home in 2022. Additional upgrades in 2023 include a new HVAC system with a NEST thermostat and new washer and dryer, while 2024 saw further exterior refreshes, a new water heater, landscaping, and guest bathroom updates. With a Generac whole-home generator, lawn irrigation system, and gutter guards, this home offers convenience and peace of mind in a quiet, friendly neighborhood. Convenient to shopping, dining, hospitals, Rockwood Nature Center, and more. Schedule your tour today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Plenty of potential in this charming Contemporary in the well established neighborhood of Solar I. Welcome to your next opportunity! This 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom contemporary home boasts 1,038 sq. ft. of potential in the highly sought-after James River High School district of North Chesterfield, VA. Nestled on a quiet cul-de-sac street , this property offers a unique blend of modern design and the promise of future updates. While this home is being sold "as is, " it presents a fantastic chance to customize and renovate to your tastes. The open-concept living space is bathed in natural light, featuring vaulted ceilings and large windows that emphasize the home's contemporary character. The kitchen, living, and dining areas flow seamlessly, making it an ideal space for both everyday living and entertaining. The Primary bedroom includes an en-suite bathroom, providing privacy and convenience. The second bedroom is generously sized and perfect for guests, a home office, or a growing family. The second full bathroom serves both the second bedroom and common areas. Outside, the property features a spacious backyard, ready to be transformed into your private oasis. Whether you’re an investor, first-time homebuyer, or looking to downsize, this home offers endless possibilities. Book your tour today and bring your builder!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome home to Lake Crystal Farms — where comfort, character, and convenience come together!  Set on nearly a full acre cleared land, this charming 4-bedroom, 2-bath rancher offers the perfect blend of classic quality and modern ease. The spacious, updated eat-in kitchen offers updated granite countertops, newer stainless steel appliances, a stylish ceramic tile backsplash, custom trim details, and a breakfast bar that’s perfect for casual meals or morning coffee. Enjoy the changing seasons from your bright sunroom, where peaceful views of the serene, tree-lined backyard create the ideal setting for relaxation. When cooler weather rolls in, cozy up by the wood-burning fireplace in the inviting family room, or entertain guests in the welcoming front living room. Downstairs, the full walk-out basement offers endless possibilities — from a game room or media lounge to a home gym or hobby space. The primary suite features new carpet, fresh paint, and a private en-suite bath, while the additional bedrooms provide plenty of space for family, guests, or a home office. With just a few personal touches, you can make this versatile home truly your own. Located in Lake Crystal Farms, you’ll love being close to shopping, dining, and major interstates — all while enjoying the peaceful feel of country-style living on almost an acre.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this delightful  &  updated maintenance free rancher in Lake Crystal Farms! Nestled on almost a FULL ACRE, This classic and quality built 4 bedroom/2 bath home boasts a FULL WALK-OUT BASEMENT, VINYL REPLACEMENT WINDOWS, A NEWER ROOF, NEWER HVAC, FRESH PAINT AND NEW CARPET. Enjoy coffee each morning on your lovely morning/sun room overlooking the serene, wooded backyard. The updated and spacious EAT-IN kitchen showcases newer STAINLESS appliances (including frig), a ceramic tile backslash, custom molding and a breakfast bar. The master bedroom has new carpet, fresh paint and an en-suite bathroom. With fall on the horizon, cuddle up with a book in your family room while feeling the warmth of a roaring fire from your wood burning fireplace. The timeless living room welcomes you as you walk through the front door. Bring your pool table, foos ball table and big screened TV as the basement is ideal for a game room and/or media room. With a few finishing touches, this versatile home could have your own style and taste. Lake Crystal Farms is centrally located close to restaurants, shopping and the interstate. Top rated Chesterfield County schools make this home a must see!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: You won’t want to miss this opportunity to live in an incredible location in one of the most sought after school districts! Conveniently nestled within minutes to all the shopping and entertainment in Green Gate, Short Pump and 288, this updated beauty is ready to welcome new owners! Updates, fresh paint and new carpet await you in this 4 Bed, 2.5 Bath Colonial in Gayton Station. The bright eat-in kitchen has been updated with granite countertops, backsplash, and stainless appliances. Use the formal dining room for entertaining or a bonus space just off the entry. The large family room has a beautiful beamed ceiling and a converted wood burning stove to add charm and character to the space. Upstairs you will find all 4 well sized bedrooms, including the primary with a walk in closet and updated en-suite. Summer is here and this back yard was made for being outside. The back deck is ready for your cookouts and the back yard is completely fenced for your furry friends!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Discover this exquisite 4-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom home, a gem nestled in the highly-desired Castleton community. Impeccably built in 2020, it features a thoughtfully designed open layout, creating a seamless flow between the living spaces. The kitchen is a chef's dream with its high-end stainless steel appliances, gas cooking, expansive center island, and convenient pantry for storage. The first floor offers a haven with a primary bedroom complete with a full bathroom, ensuring privacy and comfort. Three additional bedrooms await upstairs, perfect for family members or guests. Step outside onto the spacious deck, ideal for entertaining, and enjoy the picturesque view of the fully fenced backyard, providing a safe space for children and pets to play. This home offers an unparalleled blend of modern elegance and practicality, providing a wonderful environment to create cherished memories. Don't miss this opportunity to make this beautiful abode your own!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Maintenance free living paired with convenience to retail in the heart of Short Pump. This stunning 3 bedroom, 2.5 bath end-unit townhouse in the highly sought-after Saunders Station at Broad Hill Centre welcomes you home. Stepping inside you will notice the open floor plan an unobstructed views on all three sides. The gourmet kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, a pantry, tasteful backsplash, and a large center island, perfect for entertaining. The kitchen opens up to the spacious living room which. The main level is surrounded by windows, bringing in an abundance of natural light throughout the space. Traveling upstairs you will find three bedrooms, including the primary bedroom, which boasts dual sinks and spacious walk-in shower and attached walk in closet. The two guest rooms feature carpet flooring as well as larger closets. This beautifully finished unit is just minutes from retail and restaurants and a short commute to major highways. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome home to this well maintained colonial located on a cozy cul de sac just minutes from Short Pump. LVT installed in 2018 throughout the downstairs, updated powder room, stainless steel appliances in the kitchen, wood burning fireplace, and separate family/dining areas. Upstairs you will find 3 bedrooms and two additional bathrooms which have both been updated. Lots of fresh paint, clean, and bright. Enjoy maintenance free vinyl siding and  PVC on front porch. This home also has Milgard thermal pane windows for extra energy efficiency. The freshly painted oversized deck is perfect for entertaining and also boasts a charming pergola. Lush yard with mature landscaping with trees bordering the rear fence give it a peaceful, park like feel. There is a shed to store all of your gardening tools/equipment as well as a separate building that has new carpet with electricity. Could be an office, man cave, or she shed! HVAC new in 2021, hot water heater 3 years old.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Maintenance free living right in the heart of the West End. You are going to love all that this Contemporary Style townhouse has to offer both inside and out. This very well maintained and recently painted 3 bedroom, 2.5 bath Harbour Cove townhome welcomes you home. Stepping inside you will appreciate the open floor plan and airy atmosphere and original hardwood floors throughout the first level. Traveling past the kitchen you will notice the classic spacious, two level, living room with working wood burning fireplace. The living room also opens up to the private deck, the perfect spot to have your morning coffee, or entertain friends and family and enjoy the water view. The galley kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances and opens up to a separate dining area. Upstairs you will find three bedrooms, including the primary bedrooms, which offers a full en-suite bathroom. Community includes lake access and boating rights for non-powered boats. Addition fee for the Wilde Lake includes fishing, kayaking and small boating. Come tour this immaculate townhouse and live like you're on vacation everyday.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Located 1 block from Chimborazo Park. This renovated Victorian home is waiting for it's new owners. The home features: A new roof, 3 bedrooms, 2.5 baths, and a fully OPEN floor plan, perfect for family gatherings and entertaining. Upon entering the home you will be amazed at the huge living room (30x20) with two fireplaces, hardwood floors, and lots of natural light. There is an archway that leads into kitchen. Where you will find stainless steel appliances, granite countertops , tile backsplash, custom cabinets, and tile flooring. Upstairs is the Primary bedroom and en suite which features vaulted ceiling, heart pine floors. 2 other bedrooms with a shared full bath that features a claw foot tub. The outside of the home has a huge front porch and back deck made of sapele wood. There is an attached shed and also a detached shed for all those things you need to store away. The sale comes with 2 additional lots making the back yard big enough to enjoy for any occasion.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This stunning and meticulously-maintained Tudor in the always desirable Westcott section of Grey Oaks welcomes you home. Stepping inside you will  appreciate the open floor plan. The kitchen boasts custom JennAir stainless steel appliances, including the refrigerator, wall oven, microwave, and gas stove. The kitchen is an entertainer's dream, offering an oversized center island, perfect for entertaining. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the spacious living room. The formal dining room offers elegant tray ceilings. The main level also includes an office/ study which opens up to a private balcony, as well as an additional living room. Traveling upstairs you will find 4 bedrooms and 3 full bathrooms. The spacious primary bedroom features dual walk-in closets, a luxurious full bathroom, and an additional sitting area/ multi-purpose room just off of the bedroom. The primary bath boasts a jetted soaking tub, a walk-in shower, and dual sinks. The backyard offers a spacious patio area, perfect for relaxing in the evening or entertaining friends. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Gorgeous home with upgrades galore located in the Deep Run High School district just minutes from premier shopping and restaurants. The first floor boasts beautiful hardwood floors, spacious formal rooms and the perfect home office. The gourmet kitchen features granite counter tops, top of the line appliances, an island breakfast bar w/ pendant lights, gas cook top, two ovens, glass front cabinets and recessed lights. Just outside the home office you will find a covered porch with ceiling fan. The family room has a huge bay window and a cozy gas fireplace. The deluxe master suite features a huge sitting area, tile bath with jetted tub and separate shower. Three more nice sized bedrooms on the second level as well as another full bath. The finished 3rd floor (23X18) with a full bath can be whatever your lifestyle needs. The 3rd level also includes 2 huge walk in "attic" storage areas as well. Other benefits include  Energy Star rating, 3 zone HVAC, tankless hot water heater, 3 car garage, and so much more! Neighborhood amenities include a large pool with a slide, great clubhouse and tennis courts.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Single level living in The East End of Henrico on over a third of an acre!  This charming 4 bed 3 bath, all brick ranch offers plenty of charm and convenience to retail and travel. The home features an original slate roof, original hardwood floors, located on a corner lot and the bonus of a detached garage with an included air conditioned workshop. Upon entry you will notice the cozy living room, boasting built-ins and a fireplace. The kitchen offers stainless steel appliances and opens up to the separate, formal dining room. The Primary Bedroom offers an en-suite bath with walk in shower. Enjoy entertaining friends and family in the screened in porch area, accessible from the kitchen. Outside you will find the detached garage with a conditioned workshop, perfect for extra storage or for those who like to tinker. Updates include HVAC in 2021 and hot water heater in 2017.   Located just minutes from White Oak Shopping center and from RIC Airport. Book your tour now!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this beautifully renovated two-bedroom, one and a half bath townhome. Step inside and be greeted by a modern and stylish interior that is sure to impress. Upstairs, both bedrooms are generously sized and offer plenty of natural light, making them cozy retreats to unwind after a long day. The townhome also includes a convenient half bath on the main level, perfect for guests. Don't miss your opportunity to own this stunningly renovated townhome that combines modern comforts with a convenient location. Schedule your showing today and make it your new home!

The backyard is an entertainer's dream, boasting a screened-in porch, as well as two separate decks overlooking the full fenced yard. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This stunning and meticulously maintained 1925-built home in the sought-after Church Hill community of Richmond welcomes you home. This home offers the best of both worlds, with historic charm combined with modern finishes. Upon approaching the home you will notice the cozy and inviting front porch with composite planks. Stepping inside you will first enter the spacious living room with a large window, bringing in an abundance of natural light throughout the space. The kitchen boasts beautiful light cabinetry and stainless steel appliances (w/ gas cooking). The kitchen opens up to the spacious formal dining room. Traveling upstairs you will find three bedrooms and a full bathroom. The primary bedroom offers a private balcony which overlooks the backyard. The fully fenced backyard features a deck which opens up to a separate patio space below, perfect for entertaining. Major updated include : New roof installed in 2020, new HVAC in 2018 with smart thermostat, new shed in 2020 and lastly new water main in 2022. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 713 N 35th St in desirable neighborhood of Church Hill. 713 N 35th St. offers a rare opportunity to own a lovingly maintained detached Italianate row home with a full basement and large back yard backing up to the even larger schoolyard of Franklin Military Academy! This homes features stunning refinished heart pine floors throughout and is bathed in natural light due to the favorable and foursquare layout. You'll appreciate the original character that has been maintained with this home to include the transom window and sidelights flanking the beautiful original 4 light wood front door, the interior entryway columns and popular, period correct craftsman style trim work. This 1925 stunner also features replacement windows, freshly painted interior, low maintenance vinyl siding, stainless appliances, updated cabinetry, a beautiful large front porch to enjoy the camaraderie of fantastic neighbors and a double back deck to take in the unobstructed view of the rising sun! Raise some chickens in the large back yard (note the handsome new fence) and the kids will love the playground just beyond the property line. What more could you ask for in your new Church Hill home?

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this charming end-unit townhome nestled in Varina's New Market Village! As you step inside, you’re greeted by an inviting foyer that sets the stage for the open-concept design. The generously sized kitchen, dining, and living areas offer an ideal space for hosting guests, and the fenced-in backyard with a patio extends the entertainment options seamlessly outdoors. Journeying upstairs, the spacious owner's suite impresses with a walk-in closet and a full en-suite bath, promising a retreat-like experience. Two additional bedrooms, a full bath, and a conveniently located laundry area round out the second floor. Additional features include an attached one-car garage with direct entry to the home, providing both security and convenience. This residence is not only a great place to call home but also strategically located, making downtown, the airport, shopping, wineries, and the Virginia Capital Trail easily accessible. Don't miss out—schedule your tour today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to your slice of colonial charm in Varina, just a stone's throw away from Richmond, VA! Nestled on over 1.3 acres, this 4-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom beauty is the perfect blend of classic charm and convenience. Step inside and be greeted by a spacious living area bathed in natural light, perfect for hosting gatherings or movie nights with loved ones. The colonial-style architecture adds a touch of timeless appeal, while the open floor plan and skylights keeps things feeling fresh and airy. Whip up your favorite meals in the functional kitchen, complete with granite countertops resurfaced cabinets, and a breakfast nook for casual dining. And when it's time to unwind, retreat to the inviting Primary suite featuring an updated en-suite bathroom and plenty of room to relax. But the real magic happens outside, where your expansive yard offers endless possibilities for outdoor fun and relaxation. Imagine lazy summer afternoons spent in the freshly landscaped back yard or hosting BBQs with friends and family. And with the Virginia Capital Trail, James River, and major highways just minutes away, adventure is always right around the corner. Whether you're craving a scenic bike ride, a day of kayaking, or a night out on the town, this location has it all. Don't miss your chance to make this colonial dream home your own – schedule a showing today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This is the one you've been waiting for! End unit with fresh paint and carpet throughout! This 2 bedroom 1 1/2 bath home is perfect for low maintenance, one level living. Vaulted ceiling in the main living area gives a spacious feel to this well thought out space. All appliances convey. Kitchen comes equipped with electric range, dishwasher, microwave oven, and refrigerator. A pantry is provided for additional storage. Master bedroom has direct access to full bath with a walk in shower. Washer/dryer convey. Beautiful fenced in green space has a private feel and includes a covered concrete patio perfect for entertaining. There is also plenty of space if you have a pet that needs some exercise. Attached tool shed for additional storage.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Lovingly cared for Ranch in the highly desirable Near-West End just minutes from major retail and Carytown. This adorable Mid-Century ranch is situated on over-a-third of an acre on a well-wooded street in the heart of Tuckahoe. Upon entrance, you are warmly greeted by original hardwood floors, fresh paint, and a bright and open floor plan seamlessly connecting the living room, dining area and front office area into the recently updated kitchen. The kitchen features dark granite countertops, white backsplash and cabinets and recently updated stainless appliances. Through the kitchen you find the laundry/utility area and access to the back yard and Florida room. Down the main hallway are three spacious bedrooms including: A primary with an attached en-suite bath and another that also has access to the Florida Room. The back yard area is perfect for entertaining family and friends or just relaxing on a warm spring night or enjoy al fresco meals in the screened in gazebo that is also powered. Book your tour today to come out and see this captivating home!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: 1401 Chowan Road is a charming ONE LEVEL, three bedroom, two bath, home in the Tuckahoe Elementary school district. Situated on a beautiful and private third acre lot, this home has been updated over the years and includes a living room with gas fireplace, dining room, family room, and a bonus room/office. The backyard has a privacy fence, beautiful gazebo with ceiling fan and wired for cable, detached storage shed and multi-level decking all perfect for entertaining. Updates include most windows replaced in 2015, new exterior paint in 2016, most of interior recently painted, updated kitchen and master bath, leaf guard gutters 2015, new exterior lighting (2017), new microwave and dishwasher (2017). Roof replaced 2008, water heater 2012.

Situated on a beautiful and private third acre lot, this home has been updated over the years and includes a living room with gas fireplace, dining room, family room, and a bonus room/office. The backyard has a privacy fence, beautiful gazebo with ceiling fan and wired for cable, detached storage shed and multi-level decking all perfect for entertaining. Updates include most windows replaced in 2015, new exterior paint in 2016, most of interior recently painted, updated kitchen and master bath, leaf guard gutters 2015, new exterior lighting (2017), new microwave and dishwasher (2017). Roof replaced 2008, water heater 2012.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Beautiful 4 bedroom brick front townhome in the sought after West Broad Village located in the heart of Short Pump. If you are looking for a “smart” home, look no further!  This home features smart switches, thermostat, and doorbell with camera. Open and spacious kitchen and living area with built-ins on the 2nd floor with deck access. The bedroom located on the ground floor has an adjoining bathroom making it an ideal guest suite. The remaining 3 bedrooms  are on the 3rd level. The primary bedroom boasts access to a loft area on the fourth floor perfect for office or recreation space. All appliances convey. 2 car garage. Enjoy this walkable community minutes from restaurants and shopping. Pool, clubhouse, exercise room are across the street.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Tucked in a cul de sac and sitting on almost a half-acre lot. This stunning 4 bedroom, 2.5 bath home has so much to offer. The huge 1st floor Primary Bedroom will leave you speechless once seen in person. It comes with a sitting area with bay windows, walk in closet and huge bath with a stand-alone shower and jetted tub. The first floor open concept is perfect for entertaining, and family enjoyment. Cooking will be fun again, in the spacious kitchen. That comes fully equipped with granite counter tops, an island, upgraded cabinets, and stainless steel appliances. The first floor also has a formal dining room, huge breakfast nook with bar, and family room with high ceilings. On the second floor, you will find 3 other spacious bedrooms. There is an unfinished 3rd floor just waiting to be made into a rec room or family theater. The home also has a 2 car garage and deck.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Details make the difference in this finely styled 4 bedroom transitional classic resting on an impressive cul-de-sac homesite. Picture-perfect condition with its 1st floor owner's suite featuring a sitting room w/ columns, tray ceiling and spa bath with ceramic tile throughout. The formal dining room with its majestic columns, tray ceiling  &  chair rails offers exquisite space for fine dining. And prepare to be dazzled by the spectacular 2nd floor balcony overlooking the expansive family room with its two-story ceiling and fireplace. First floor study with french doors  &  bookcase, morning room, gourmet-like kitchen with granite countertops, ceramic tile flooring and stainless steel range, double oven, dishwasher  &  microwave--all offer the ultimate in comfort and elegance. A REAL GEM!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This 2-bedroom condo perfectly blends comfort, convenience, and lifestyle. The spacious design, with large windows that flood the space with natural light, creates a welcoming atmosphere. The contemporary open-plan layout seamlessly connects the modern kitchen, featuring sleek granite countertops, to a cozy living area ideal for both relaxation and entertaining. The two generously sized bedrooms provide privacy and comfort, while a private balcony extends your living space outdoors, offering a peaceful retreat with fresh air and beautiful views. The condo’s prime location enhances its appeal, providing easy access to a variety of shopping, dining, and recreational options. For those who commute or enjoy weekend getaways, major highways are conveniently nearby. A fantastic park, complete with a skate park and plenty of green space, is also just a short distance away, offering a perfect setting for outdoor activities. With maintenance-free living, you can embrace a dynamic, active lifestyle while enjoying all the benefits of a well-connected, vibrant community. Located near the Laurel Lakes Rec Center, the Glen Allen Cultural Arts Center, scenic trails, and more, this condo is the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and vibrant living.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: EXACTLY what you have been looking for!  Wonderful 2 bedroom 2 baths unit that is only missing your furniture. .. there's nothing left to do!  New paint and carpet throughout, new granite counters, stainless steel double bowl sink, and microwave, double door refrigerator with water and ice dispenser, pantry, as well as a great granite breakfast bar. You will love eating in your dining room with access to deck overlooking a beautiful creek. The master bedroom has a large walk in closet and private bath with ceramic tile shower stall. (tub/shower with ceramic tile surround in the hall bath). Do miss the laundry room with shelving, dryer and new washer. You do not want to miss this one!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Amazing LOCATION on Monument Ave. This updated top-floor end unit in historic Rixey Court offers an updated kitchen with a new backsplash and beautiful Quartz countertops. Spacious Living Room with a Custom Built-In Bench Dining Area. Renovated Jack-and-Jill Bath shared between the Primary and 2nd Bedroom. Beautiful Hardwood Floors throughout. The charming private balcony is the perfect spot to catch the 10k and watch all the activity living on Monument Avenue offers. The 2nd Bedroom has charming French Door access to the balcony. Only ½ block to all the shopping and restaurants on Strawberry St. Easy access to VFMA  &  Siegel Center.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Looking for that "Hidden Gem" of a home? Than welcome home. Offering four bedrooms, two full and two half baths, all original hardwood floors throughout, large windows and more updates than can be mentioned. This stately, all brick Colonial offers all you could want and more. Stepping inside you will notice the spacious formal living room and hardwood flooring throughout the first and second floors. The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances including a brand new double oven. Corian countertops, custom ceiling height cabinets  as well as a large center island, perfect for cooking and entertaining. The kitchen flows into the cozy family room, which then flows into the separate, large sunroom leading out to the backyard. The main level also features a mud/ utility room with washer and dryer, as well as a formal dining room. Upstairs you will find the primary bedroom with en-siute bath as well as 3 bedrooms and additional full bath. The backyard offers a spacious deck off of the sunroom, perfect for relaxing in the evening or entertaining friends. Schedule your tour today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 3610 Falstone Road! Impeccably maintained and updated two story home in established neighborhood. Hardwood floors throughout. Kitchen updated with custom cabinets that extend to ceiling and Corian countertops with integrated sink. Stainless steel appliances and ceramic tile backsplash less than two years old. Home has three separate heating and cooling systems: upstairs, downstairs, and Florida room for year round convenience. Spacious eat-in kitchen with island, two downstairs half bathrooms with new ceramic tile floor, and spacious deck and patio provide perfect space for entertaining! Upstairs you will find four spacious bedrooms. Make sure you check all the doors to find closet space in each room and two floored walk-in closets accessible from the master and front bedroom. One full bathroom in the hall, two linen closets in the landing, and a full bathroom in the master bedroom. Owners converted beautiful Florida room with vaulted ceilings, built deck and storage shed, laid paver patio and raised garden beds, widened driveway, installed replacement windows, replaced sewer line from house to street, and installed tankless hot water heater. All these updates and more!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 3610 Falstone Road! Impeccably maintained and updated two story home in established neighborhood. Hardwood floors throughout. Kitchen updated with custom cabinets that extend to ceiling and Corian countertops with integrated sink. Stainless steel appliances and ceramic tile backsplash less than two years old. Home has three separate heating and cooling systems: upstairs, downstairs, and Florida room for year round convenience. Spacious eat-in kitchen with island, two downstairs half bathrooms with new ceramic tile floor, and spacious deck and patio provide perfect space for entertaining! Upstairs you will find four spacious bedrooms. Make sure you check all the doors to find closet space in each room and two floored walk-in closets accessible from the master and front bedroom. One full bathroom in the hall, two linen closets in the landing, and a full bathroom in the master bedroom. Owners converted beautiful Florida room with vaulted ceilings, built deck and storage shed, laid paver patio and raised garden beds, widened driveway, installed replacement windows, replaced sewer line from house to street, and installed tankless hot water heater. All these updates and more!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Charming Ranch in Tuckahoe – Stylishly Renovated  &  Move-In Ready!    Welcome home to this absolutely adorable 3-bedroom, 1 and a 1/2 -bath Ranch-style gem in the heart of Henrico’s sought-after Tuckahoe area! Originally built in the 1950s, this home was completely remodeled and rebuilt from the inside out in 2014, offering the best of both worlds—classic curb appeal with modern finishes and systems. Step inside to discover gorgeous hardwood floors flowing throughout the main living spaces, complemented by sleek recessed lighting and an open, airy layout. The kitchen is a true showstopper, featuring stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and a stylish tile backsplash—perfect for cooking and entertaining. Enjoy peace of mind with fully updated plumbing and electrical systems, plus thoughtful touches throughout that make this home as functional as it is beautiful. With 864 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space, this home is ideal for first-time buyers, those looking to downsize, or anyone seeking low-maintenance living without sacrificing style. Located just minutes from the shops and restaurants of Short Pump and convenient to major commuting routes, this is the perfect spot to enjoy both comfort and convenience. Don’t miss your chance to own this move-in-ready beauty in one of Henrico County’s most desirable neighborhoods—schedule your showing today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Conveniently located and well maintained Colonial that is barely 3 years new and ready for its new owners. This gem of a home offers 4 beds, 2.5 baths located in the heart of Autumn Grove in North Chesterfield welcomes you home upon entry. The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, beautiful cabinetry as well as a cozy breakfast nook. On the main level you will also find the formal dining room and the living room. Traveling upstairs you will find four bedrooms, including the primary bedroom, which boasts walk in closet, an en-suite bathroom with a double vanity, a walk-in shower, and a soaking tub. The private wooded backyard offers a spacious deck, perfect for relaxing in the evening or entertaining friends. Upgrades in 2019 include HVAC, Roof, hot water heater and new SS Appliances. Centrally located near 288, 150, I95 and Just 15 Minutes from Downtown Richmond. This recently built gem of a home offers so much for its next owners to enjoy for years to come. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Location, location, location! Welcome to 2710 Stuart Ave #2, in the Saint Andrews Building. This charming ground floor unit offers everything you could want and then some! Literally across the street from the Virginia Museum of Fine Arts and the Virginia Historical Society and walking distance from Carytown and local restaurants. This Condo offers one full bedroom, an extra space perfect for a home office, and one full bath. The gourmet kitchen boasts beautiful walnut cabinetry with stainless steel appliances and granite counters/island. The living area opens up to a street level balcony right on Stuart Ave. The full bathroom offers a walk-in shower and large vanity. Newer HVAC system (installed in 2021) and original hardwood floors throughout. In-unit washer and dryer combination unit as well as on site laundry and additional storage. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Experience the warmth and charm of this delightful 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom Cape Cod nestled in the heart of the Crestview neighborhood in Tuckahoe. As you step inside, you'll be welcomed by a spacious living room, complete with a snug gas fireplace that creates a cozy ambiance. Large windows gracefully fill the room with the soothing embrace of natural light. The kitchen effortlessly transitions into a formal dining room, making it the perfect spot for shared meals and memorable gatherings. On the first floor, you'll discover a primary bedroom, complete with its own full bathroom for added convenience. Upstairs, two additional bedrooms and another full bathroom await, ensuring comfort for everyone. Step outside to the serene deck, which offers a picturesque view of the lovingly manicured backyard. The detached shed adds to the charm and practicality of the outdoor space. This property is a true gem that you won't want to miss the opportunity to explore in person. It's a cozy haven where you can create cherished memories and savor the simple joys of life.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Looking for low maintenance living just minutes away from local attractions? Welcome home to this charming end-unit 2 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom townhouse in the sought after Cedarhurst community of Richmond. The updated kitchen boasts light cabinetry, stainless appliances, quartz countertops, and tasteful tile backsplash. Off of the kitchen you will find the separate dining area. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the spacious living room, which features beautiful crown molding, recessed lighting a ceiling fan, and a fireplace. The 500 Sq ft basement has been recently upgraded with fresh carpeting and recessed lighting, and offers direct access to the backyard. Traveling upstairs you will find 2 bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms. All bathrooms have been updated with new vanities. Other recent upgrades throughout the house include newer carpeting in the bedrooms (2018), newer water heater (2019), and laminate flooring throughout the main level. This home is ideally located close to the local farmer's market, Maymont, Food Lion, Target, Walmart, and Publix. Additionally, it is located less than a mile from the highway entrance, making it a commuter's dream. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This awesome 4 Bedroom 2 ½ Bath home with WALK-OUT BASEMENT and almost 3,000 sq feet is not to be missed! The beautiful stacked stone exterior and covered front porch are the perfect welcome as you pull up to your new home! Inside you’ll find a flex space (currently being used as an office) that flows into the open concept Great Room with gas fireplace and Eat-In-Kitchen. The Kitchen was finished with many upgrades including stainless appliances, white shaker cabinets and granite counters. The chef in the house will love the gas range! Upstairs you will find 3 generously sized secondary bedrooms and a spacious Primary Suite with 5 Piece bath. Never drag laundry up the stairs again with the 2nd floor Laundry Room right in the main hallway. The FINISHED BASEMENT is ready to entertain in! Completed with a second Rec Space and another flex space perfect for a second secluded office or craft room. The unfinished space is large enough to use as a home gym or for tons of storage. This home sits on a wooded lot backing to protected space – you’ll never have neighbors behind you. Adams Park is a charming enclave neighborhood convenient to major highways, shopping and dining!

Inside you’ll find a flex space (currently being used as an office) that flows into the open concept Great Room with gas fireplace and Eat-In-Kitchen. The Kitchen was finished with many upgrades including stainless appliances, white shaker cabinets and granite counters. The chef in the house will love the gas range! Upstairs you will find 3 generously sized secondary bedrooms and a spacious Primary Suite with 5 Piece bath. Never drag laundry up the stairs again with the 2nd floor Laundry Room right in the main hallway. The FINISHED BASEMENT is ready to entertain in! Completed with a second Rec Space and another flex space perfect for a second secluded office or craft room. The unfinished space is large enough to use as a home gym or for tons of storage. This home sits on a wooded lot backing to protected space – you’ll never have neighbors behind you. Adams Park is a charming enclave neighborhood convenient to major highways, shopping and dining!

dataSourceDisplay.dataSourceDescription: Central Virginia Regional Multiple Listing Service (CVRMLS)
