marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to Beckham House in sought after Bon Air, VA. Enter into this light filled home and you are welcomed to gorgeous hardwood floors throughout the first and second levels. This charming 5 bedroom, 3 bath bath split level pairs clean open concept living with classic mid century charm. Stepping inside you will notice the open concept main living area, with updated kitchen, would be an ideal space for gatherings. The kitchen boasts an oversized center island, perfect for additional cooking space. The main level also includes a spacious living room, as well as a formal dining room. From the dining room you can step out into the sunroom, which is the perfect spot for relaxing in the evening or entertaining friends. Upstairs boasts four spacious bedrooms and two updated bathrooms, including an en-suite. The lower level offers a generous family room with new carpet, a home office or fifth bedroom, updated bathroom, and mudroom/laundry offering ample storage. Close to shopping, restaurants, Trader Joe's and Good Foods Natural Market, plus minutes to Larus Park, Huguenot Flatwaters, U of R, or downtown Richmond. Book your next tour soon!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Attention Renovators! Wonderful mid-century modern 5 bedroom 3 bath spacious tri-level with good bones and newer dimensional shingle roof. Vaulted ceiling living room with refinished oak floor and picture window and is open to the dining room that has atrium doors to the screened porch and 18x14 deck. The large sunny eat-in kitchen is a good space with lots of potential. 1st level has large paneled family room w/ stone Fireplace  &  built in bookcases, bedroom, full bath and laundry room with washer/dryer, sink  &  boiler. Upstairs 3 more bedrooms plus a master suite, oak floors, 2 ceramic tile baths and 2 attic storage areas. Outside there is a paved drive, a carport and a detached storage shed. The best part is the location - a level, sunny corner lot in the heart of Bon Air - just 3 blocks off Huguenot Rd! Walk to the Bon Air Library, Bon Air Elementary and just a 5 minute ride to the Bon Air Community Center, Joe's Inn, Perk!, Martins, Gelato Celesti and much more! Ten minutes to stony Point Mall and the James River Parks, restaurants, hospitals and shopping.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Great business opportunity! This home has a full kitchen and full bathroom on the first floor and a full kitchen and full bathroom on the second floor. Each tenant has a bedroom and shares the kitchen/bath on their floor. There is potential to house 6 tenants. The current tenants have lived there for 4 years and would like to stay. They pay $500 per month. A new furnace was installed in 2014. The hot water heaters are 4 and 5 years old. New porch flooring was installed in 2016. New gutters in 2016. New shower/tub in 2015.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Expansive and elegantly designed by James Ziegler, this stately 5-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom brick colonial nestled in the esteemed Windsor Place West community of Henrico exudes grandeur and comfort. The main level welcomes you with a generously proportioned kitchen offering ample space for culinary pursuits and gatherings. An adjoining butler's pantry seamlessly connects to the sophisticated formal dining room, enhancing the overall grace and functionality of the home. The main level also features a welcoming family room distinguished by a charming fireplace, perfect for cozy evenings and entertaining guests. The Primary Bedroom Suite, also on the first floor, stands out with its luxurious full bathroom, creating a private oasis for relaxation and rejuvenation. Upstairs, the home graciously hosts 4 well-appointed bedrooms, providing flexibility and ample space for rest and privacy. Boasting classic brick architecture and a thoughtful layout, this residence harmoniously combines modern convenience with timeless charm, creating an inviting and comfortable sanctuary for you and your family to call home in the heart of the Windsor Place West community.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Come experience the perfect blend of historic allure and contemporary convenience in this 1915-build classic foursquare!  Revel in stunning hardwood floors, original moldings, and tall ceilings, alongside a modern kitchen filled with gorgeous natural stone (marble backsplash, soapstone countertops, granite sink) and a convenient mudroom with a washer  &  dryer. Upstairs you'll find three bedrooms, including a primary suite with a lavish marble shower, and a fully-waterproofed hall bath that's perfect for kids!  Step outside to a fully fenced yard with a generous deck, or head over to the PLAYGROUND, TENNIS COURTS, or POOL at the end of the block! ---- All NEW PLUMBING ---- NEW ROOF ---- NEW ELECTRICAL ---- Many NEW APPLIANCES

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome home to this unique gem of a home! The kitchen offers stainless steel appliances, light cabinetry, and offers a separate eat-in area. The kitchen flows into the living room, which offers a charming brick fireplace. This home offers convenient one level living, with all of the  bedrooms being on the same level. The main level also features a formal dining room, as well as an additional den, perfect for a home office/ study. One unique feature this home is the large loft space located above the garage, perfect for a rec room or additional living room. The backyard offers a deck as well as an additonal patio space, perfect for relaxing in the evening or entertaining friends. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Experience timeless charm and modern elegance in this meticulously renovated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath home nestled in the heart of Richmond's historic Fan District. Built in 1910, this captivating residence seamlessly blends historic architecture with contemporary amenities, offering a unique living experience. Step into a meticulously crafted interior that showcases the perfect fusion of vintage character and modern comfort. The house underwent a comprehensive renovation in 2018, ensuring a harmonious balance between historical charm and modern features. From the original hardwood floors to the crown molding, every detail has been thoughtfully preserved and enhanced. The property boasts three spacious bedrooms, providing ample space for relaxation. The 2.5 bathrooms have been tastefully redesigned with high-end finishes, offering a touch of luxury. The Primary Suite provides a private oasis, complete with a spa-like bathroom and generous closet space. Entertain with ease in the open-concept kitchen, equipped with modern appliances and stylish finishes. A highlight of this home is the garage, providing convenience in the heart of The City. Location is key, and this residence excels in proximity to Richmond's vibrant cultural scene. Enjoy short walking distances to an array of restaurants and museums, allowing you to immerse yourself in the rich history and contemporary charm of the Fan and Museum Districts. Whether it's a leisurely stroll to a local eatery or a cultural excursion to nearby museums, the best of Richmond is at your doorstep. Take advantage of the unique opportunity with four years left on the tax abatement, offering financial benefits for years to come. This 1910 gem, renewed in 2018, invites you to experience the perfect blend of history and modernity. With three bedrooms, 2.5 baths, a garage, and a prime Fan District location, this residence is an exceptional opportunity to embrace the charm of Richmond's past while enjoying the comforts of contemporary living. Book your tour today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to your dream townhouse in the coveted Belle Heights community of Richmond, VA! Built in 2021, this stunning end unit offers maintenance free living with three bedrooms with two full and two half bathrooms, perfect for families or professionals seeking modern comfort. Step inside to discover an airy, open-concept layout flooded with natural light, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The sleek kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and ample cabinet space, making meal preparation a breeze. Enjoy gatherings in the generously sized living and dining areas, ideal for entertaining guests or cozy nights in. Retreat to the luxurious primary suite featuring a private bathroom and walk-in closet, offering a peaceful sanctuary to unwind after a long day. Two additional bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, a home office, or hobbies. Conveniently located just minutes from downtown Richmond and major highways, commuting is a breeze. Plus, outdoor enthusiasts will love the proximity to the James River, perfect for scenic walks, picnics, or kayaking adventures. Don't miss this opportunity to experience modern living in one of Richmond's fastest growing neighborhoods. Schedule your viewing today and make this your new home sweet home!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome home to this beautiful 3 bedroom all brick ranch on 3/4 acre lot with its share of wooded and cleared land. As you enter into the home you are welcomed by hardwood floors spanning end to end of the living area. On your left is a spacious living room with a picture window and gas fireplace. The kitchen boasts quartz counters and ss appliances. Past the dining room is your own private den with built-in bookcases and French doors leading into the backyard. This home has been recently updated and well cared for, with LVP flooring installed in the den in 2020. The roof was replaced in 2019, HVAC in 2015, and water heater in 2014. The backyard is fenced in, and there is a 24 x 10 workshop/tool shed with electricity and a workbench. It has an outstanding location - convenient yet private on a cul-de-sac street across from Lake Page. Just minutes to downtown, shopping, restaurants, medical facilities, the West end, Midlothian. Crestwood Farms offers an optional owners association ($25/yr) to use the lake with a picnic area, dock, fishing, canoeing, and annual community events such as a Spring pig roast and Easter egg hunt  &  sunrise service.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Don't miss this renovated brick 3 bedroom, 2 1/2 bath one level home. Located on a 3/4 acre level wooded lot in Crestwood Farms, it has an outstanding location - convenient yet private on a cul-de-sac street across from Lake Page. Features you'll love include quartz countertops  &  SS appliances  &  pantry in kitchen w/ door to a large exposed aggregate patio, spacious master bedroom has a new private bath w/ a great ceramic tile shower w borderless glass door enclosure. There are beautiful hardwood floors, crown molding  &  chair rail, a large livingroom w/ FP  &  picture window, dining room + a familyroom w/ built-in bookcases  &  French doors to the patio. Outside, the 30 yr roof is new, the heat pump is 4 yrs, backyard is fenced, there's a paved drive  &  a 24 x 10 workshop/toolshed w electricity and a workbench. Crestwood Farms offers an optional owners association ($25/yr) to use the lake with a picnic area, dock, fishing, canoeing + special events such as a yearly pig roast, lasagna dinner, Easter egg hunt  &  sunrise service, Christmas caroling  &  more. Centrally located, you're just minutes to downtown, shopping, restaurants, medical facilities, the West end, Midlothian and great schools.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this beautifully updated 3-bedroom, 3.5-bath townhouse located in the sought-after Bay Cove community in the heart of Henrico County's West End. Offering 1,844 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space, this home is a perfect blend of comfort and convenience. Step inside to find brand-new hardwood flooring on the main level, complemented by fresh paint throughout. The fully renovated kitchen boasts sleek granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and ample cabinet space—ideal for home chefs and entertainers alike. The upper level features two spacious bedrooms, including the luxurious primary suite with an ensuite bath and walk-in closet. New carpet provides a cozy feel throughout the upper and lower levels. The walk-out basement adds valuable living space with a third bedroom, a full bath, and access to the outdoors—perfect for guests or a home office. Situated in the desirable Bay Cove community, residents enjoy access to a refreshing pool, serene lake views, and proximity to premier shopping, dining, and major highways. This home also features a brand-new HVAC system, ensuring comfort year-round. Don’t miss the chance to make this move-in-ready gem your own! Schedule a showing today!

New ceramic tile throughout first floor, new carpet on all 3 levels, new stainless appliances and newer Lennox heat pump are just a few of the upgrades. 2 master bedrooms on 2nd floor. Wonderful location off Lauderdale/Causeway with top schools and in walking distance to many shops! PLEASE NOTE OWNERS LAST NAME IS "TENNANT". IT IS OWNER OCCUPIED!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this like new townhome convenient to everything. Too many upgrades to mention them all. In the kitchen you will find quartz countertops, large island, upgraded cabinetry, under cabinet/recessed lighting. Hardwood flooring throughout the first floor, cozy gas fireplace, and 9 foot ceilings. On the second floor enjoy a loft area perfect for an office or additional living space. The spacious primary bedroom boasts a pan ceiling, lighted walk in closet with built in shelving. and beautiful finishes in the en suite which has a soaking tub and separate shower. Entertain in the green space and enjoy a maintenance free privacy fence, a perfect area if you have a pet. Oversized 2 car garage, home wired for a security system, pool, club house, walking paths, bark parks. Why build when you can have a like new home without the wait!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: LOCATION LOCATION! A great 3 bedroom 1.5 bath ranch in a quiet neighborhood in the West End. Walk the kids to Longan Elementary School right down the street! What a great opportunity to be in the west end with great schools at this price. Brand new Tucker High School will be done for '21-'22 school year also!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: You will not want to miss this meticulously maintained  Transitional Home in the , always desirable, Hollymeade neighborhood. Offering three bedrooms, two and a half bathrooms, as well plenty of recent updates, this home is ready for you to make it your own. Enter and notice all the natural light that the large windows throughout the first floor allow to pour into the main living space. To the left you have a formal dining area which could also be used as a bright and sunny office area. The open living room has a fireplace, deck access and transitions into the kitchen. The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances recessed lighting and has access to the garage. Traveling upstairs; to the right you will find 3 bedrooms as well as the laundry area. The primary bedroom offers an updated en- suite bathroom with double vanity and a walk in closet. Upstairs you also have a seperate bonus area with under eves storage space; perfect for an office or use it as a flex area. marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Historic charm is combined with modern practicality in this 1921 built Woodland Heights home. This home is ideally located on a prime corner lot and move-in-ready. Upon entering you are welcomed by the grand staircase and newly refinished original hardwood floors throughout. The kitchen boasts updated cabinetry with a gorgeous backsplash, as well as stainless steel appliances and ceramic tile flooring. The kitchen then flows into the spacious formal dining room, as well as the living room; both offering original hardwood floors and 9 ft ceilings. Traveling upstairs you will find four spacious bedrooms and one full bathroom featuring original tile floor and claw foot tub. The fully fenced backyard offers a spacious deck and hardscaped patio, ideal for entertaining. for convenience, there are four off-street spaces accessible from the rear alley. Ideally located close to major shopping, dining, and entertainment that Richmond has to offer! This location cannot be beat! Come take a look and fall in love with this recently updated, but classically charming home. Book your tour soon!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Situated on a large corner lot this home is minutes from downtown and short walk to the James River Park System, Laura Lee’s, Crossroads and many of the best spots the South Side of Richmond has to offer. Come check out this 4 bed, 1.5 bath home in highly desirable Woodland Heights. This home has been extensively refurbished and well cared for over the years. You are sure to love the refinished wood floors throughout, the beautiful old mantle and trim, new designer light fixtures, and beautifully updated kitchen. Kitchen includes new leathered granite counters, stainless appliances, white cabinets and new ceramic tile flooring. Other more practical updates include a brand new roof and new gas furnace. Pull down attic, walk down basement, off street parking and mudroom provide great storage and ease of use. The interior and exterior have been freshly painted and the windows were previously replaced to thermal windows. This is a classic Richmond home with a ton of updates in a great area. Please book your showing today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: The FLORENCE offers just the right amount of space, with the flexibility to customize based on one’s lifestyle. The foyer opens up immediately into the light-filled dining room/living room combination. A coat closet is discreetly tucked away between the hallway and the main level powder room. The family room is large enough for any size family gathering, whether it’s formal or informal. The dining area and kitchen are located conveniently next to the family room. Kitchen highlights include an ISLAND, walk-in pantry  &  recessed lights. APPLIANCES ARE INCLUDED! The laundry room/mud room combination provides easy access into the two-car garage. Upstairs, you’ll discover four bedrooms and two bathrooms. The Owner's Suite features a Garden Tub  &  Shower + Walk-In Closet  &  Sitting Area! Garage door opener, an additional cable prewire, 3 light pre-wires  &  3 Ceiling Fan Rough-Ins have been added as well as Deck! Design Package: LINCOLN

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Looking for your next home in The West End but don't want an HOA? Then welcome home to 12401 Courtyard Ln! This charming transitional style home sits on a cul-de-sac street in an HOA free community and offers the convenience of being located just minutes from West Broad Village. Stepping inside you will first come to appreciate the open layout and newly refinished original hardwood floors throughout. The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances (w / gas cooking) Corian counters, walk in pantry, and shaker style cabinets. The kitchen opens up to the spacious living room with a gas fireplace and access to the screened in porch. Next to the kitchen you will also find the formal dining room with beautiful crown molding and wainscoting. Upstairs you will find four bedrooms, including the primary bedroom, which offers a gorgeous full bathroom with a dual sink vanity, walk-in shower, and a soaking tub. The backyard is an entertainer's dream and offers a screened-in porch with composite decking which opens up to separate, outdoor patio space. Recently painted throughout, brand new HVAC/Heating system and newly refinished hardwood floors throughout. Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This stunning residence built by Bradford Homes offers an impressive 6 bedrooms, 6 bathrooms, and over 5700 square feet of living space. Step inside and be captivated by the clean, modern feel that permeates throughout the entire home. The main floor boasts an open and flowing layout, perfect for both entertaining and everyday living. The gourmet kitchen is a chef's dream, featuring Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances, sleek cabinetry, and a spacious island that invites culinary creativity. The adjoining dining area and living room provide a seamless transition, ideal for hosting unforgettable gatherings. Upstairs, you'll discover the luxurious Primary Suite with private sitting area, and a spa-like ensuite bathroom. Additional bedrooms on this level provide ample space for family or guests and offer large closets. The finished daylight basement and finished third floor can be used to suit your specific needs, either as a home theater, a home gym, or a spacious entertainment area. Nestled in the Estates of Hampshire, this exceptional property provides privacy and tranquility, all while being conveniently located near renowned schools, shopping centers, and major transportation routes.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this stunning 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom rowhouse located in the beautiful Chimborazo section of Church Hill. Built in 1909, this home has been impeccably maintained and beautifully updated to offer modern amenities while retaining its historic charm. Step inside, and you'll be greeted by an inviting foyer, complete with hardwood floors and a beautiful staircase. To your left, you'll find a cozy living room, perfect for relaxing after a long day. The adjacent kitchen has been fully updated and boasts modern appliances, granite countertops, making it a joy to cook and entertain in. Upstairs, you'll find three bedrooms, each with its own unique character. The primary bedroom has an en-suite bathroom features a walk-in shower and double vanities. Overall, this stunning rowhouse in Church Hill is the perfect blend of historic charm and modern convenience. With its spacious living areas, updated kitchen and bathrooms, this home has everything you need to live comfortably and enjoyably. Don't miss out on the opportunity to make it your own so book a tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This stunning and meticulously maintained home in the always desirable Meadowbrook Farm community of Chesterfield welcomes you home! Recently updated with new flooring and paint throughout this home is move in ready! Upon entering the home you will first appreciate the open layout. The kitchen boasts recessed lighting, stainless steel appliances, and offers an oversized center island. The kitchen flows into the spacious living room. From the kitchen you can step out to the private, rear deck. Just off of the living room you will find the separate bonus room, perfect for a home office. Traveling upstairs you will find 5 bedrooms, including the primary bedroom, which features a full bathroom with a dual sink vanity, a walk-in shower, and a soaking tub. Solar panels are paid for and have contributed to an energy bill under $15/Month.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 6149 Windrush Ct in N. Chesterfield's Meadowbrook Farm! This home offers over 3,000 sf and has been well maintained since built in 2015. Property features include large and bright formal rooms, eat-in kitchen, family room, 5 true bedrooms including a Primary Suite with 2 walk-in closets. The kitchen offers plenty of cabinetry and countertop space, SS appliances and a walk-in pantry. A downstairs office/room off the family room is perfect for a remote workspace. Upgrades to the home include a 41 panel solar system. The solar panels exceed the electric usage resulting in zero costs. A water conditioning system, 6 zone-irrigation, gas tankless hot water heater, 2-car garage and much more. Quick access to 288, i95, Chippenham Pkwy. Downtown Richmond in just 15 minutes.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this stunning brick end-unit townhouse conveniently located just minutes from Chippenham Hospital and the Parkway! With its open layout, this home offers a spacious and inviting atmosphere. The first floor is finished with a full bathroom, making it an ideal space for an in-law suite or guests. The kitchen was renovated in 2016 and boasts stainless steel appliances, a center island, and recessed lighting, creating a perfect setting for entertaining. The kitchen seamlessly flows into the dining area and the great room. The morning room, with its abundant natural light provides a charming space that opens up to the rear deck. Upstairs, you'll find two large, well-appointed bedrooms. The primary bedroom features a luxurious full bathroom complete with a gorgeous walk-in shower, a soaking tub, and a dual sink vanity. Don't miss the opportunity to tour this gem of a home!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome home to 1205 Providence Knoll Dr—a beautifully upgraded residence where comfort meets style in every detail. This private end-unit location offers peace and serenity, perfect for enjoying the sounds of nature from your spacious deck—an ideal spot for your morning coffee or evening unwind. Inside, thoughtful updates create a move-in-ready haven you’ll love coming home to. At the heart of the home is a stunning kitchen remodel, featuring elegant quartz countertops, a genuine marble backsplash, brand-new appliances with extended warranties, and all-new cabinetry. Whether you're hosting or simply enjoying a quiet night in, this kitchen combines beauty with top-tier functionality. With 4 bedrooms and 3 full baths, there’s plenty of flexible space—including a fourth bedroom that works perfectly as a den, office, guest room, or whatever suits your needs. The huge primary suite overlooks a tranquil view of the trees, offering a true retreat with room to relax and recharge. Upstairs you'll find new vinyl flooring in the bathrooms and laundry room, a convenient upstairs laundry with utility sink, and updated lighting fixtures throughout. The loft area provides additional flexibility—ideal for a reading nook, home office, or play space. The home has been freshly painted (August 2024) in a calm, modern palette and includes custom blinds, a newer HVAC unit, and numerous stylish upgrades throughout. Located in a friendly neighborhood with frequent social activities if you’d like to join in, this is more than just a house—it’s a lifestyle. Come see why 1205 Providence Knoll Dr is the perfect place to begin your next chapter. Everything has been thoughtfully done—you just need to move in and make it yours.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this one-of-a-kind English Tudor in Chickahominy Bluffs, nestled on over three-quarters of an acre and offering unmatched charm, privacy, and modern updates. This architectural gem impresses from the moment you arrive, with its classic half-timbered stucco and brick exterior, lattice-grid windows, and inviting curb appeal. Inside, you’ll find rich oak floors, custom built-ins, and thoughtful details throughout. The living room showcases a Civil War-era mantle and mirror over the wood-burning fireplace, while the cozy library and sun-drenched family room with gas fireplace offer multiple spaces to relax or entertain. A bright glass sunroom provides a stunning view of the wooded bluff, leading to a tiered deck and hardscape patio with a tranquil water feature—perfect for peaceful evenings outdoors. The gourmet kitchen features granite countertops, a peninsula bar, stainless appliances, and a charming breakfast nook. Nearby, the formal dining room is ideal for hosting. Also on the main level: two half baths, a laundry room with chute, and a 2.5-car garage with direct entry. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite includes a walk-in closet, cedar closet, and a spa-like ensuite bath renovated in 2023 with hand-painted tile, sunken tub, and glass-enclosed shower. Two additional bedrooms and a fully remodeled hall bath (2024) provide comfortable accommodations. A finished loft, versatile bonus rooms—including a home office/craft space or a game room—and a secondary staircase add functionality and charm. In 2025, the attic was finished to include a fifth bedroom and half bath—perfect for guests or a private retreat. Added features: gutter guards, whole-house generator, and a shed with A/C and electricity—ideal for an artist’s studio or playhouse. All in a quiet, established neighborhood with no HOA and optional SwimRVA pool access. Don’t miss this one!

dataSourceDisplay.dataSourceDescription: Central Virginia Regional Multiple Listing Service (CVRMLS)

Also on the main level: two half baths, a laundry room with chute, and a 2.5-car garage with direct entry. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite includes a walk-in closet, cedar closet, and a spa-like ensuite bath renovated in 2023 with hand-painted tile, sunken tub, and glass-enclosed shower. Two additional bedrooms and a fully remodeled hall bath (2024) provide comfortable accommodations. A finished loft, versatile bonus rooms—including a home office/craft space or a game room—and a secondary staircase add functionality and charm. In 2025, the attic was finished to include a fifth bedroom and half bath—perfect for guests or a private retreat. Added features: gutter guards, whole-house generator, and a shed with A/C and electricity—ideal for an artist’s studio or playhouse. All in a quiet, established neighborhood with no HOA and optional SwimRVA pool access. Don’t miss this one!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Just listed in Chickahominy Bluffs with the privacy of a 3/4+ acre lot! This elegant, turn-key English Tudor is ready for its next owner. You'll love coming home to this quality built architectural marvel, boasting details like decorative half timbered stucco  &  brick exterior, lattice-grid windows, crown molding, custom built-in bookcases, multiple fireplaces  &  exposed wood beams. Enter the front covered stoop to the foyer with built in seating, stained glass picture window  &  to where the flawless tongue  &  groove oak floors begin  &  continue throughout most of the first floor. This home has it all, from the formal dining room, to a formal living room with wood fireplace with a Civil war era mirror/mantle, library with custom bult-in bookcases, family room with a gas fireplace  &  a glass sunroom with a dramatic view of the bluff. The gourmet kitchen includes granite counters, stainless undermount sink, tile backsplash, new Samsung appliances  &  a granite peninsula adjacent to breakfast room. The first floor is complete with a laundry room with laundry shoot, two half baths  &  a direct entry 2.5 car garage. Up the entry hardwood staircase is a spacious loft then the primary suite with a walk-in closet, cedar closet  &  NEW (2023) private bath with sunken tub, separate shower with seamless glass enclosure  &  stunning handmade ceramic tile. Two additional bedrooms are also sizable  &  share the hall bath with original 1976 tile, double vanity  &  a tub/shower. Additional rooms include the work out room (or 4th bedroom with closet), game room with pool table  &  secondary stairs to the main floor  &  a craft room/office with built-in workspace. Outside the sunroom is a deck, an extensive hardscape patio with water feature, shed with electricity/AC unit  &  deck balcony built over the breathtaking wooded bluff. You must schedule a private showing to truly appreciate this one of kind home!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Looking for low maintenance living with the bonus of a First Floor Primary Suite?  Welcome home to 5700 Riverside Place. This stunning end unit townhome is meticulously maintained, well adorned inside and out, and ready for its new owners. Entering you are welcomed to sparkling Luxury Vinyl Plank flooring throughout and a 2nd story entry. The kitchen boasts all stainless steel appliances as well as granite countertops. The living room is bathed in all of the natural light from large windows in the two story living area. Offering three full bedrooms including first floor Primary Suite with an attached five fixture en-suite bath, as well as two spacious bedrooms upstairs with an additional loft living room!  Relax with family and friends on the new hardscaped patio, further adding to the joy of this private end unit.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: LAST CHANCE! This is the LAST Dunmere home available for sale in Saunders Station! Take advantage of this prime location by Wegmans in Short Pump. Great floorplan, great location, great schools! Live the good life in our maintenance free, new construction Dunmere. Whether you choose to tap into your inner chef in the expertly designed island kitchen or simply relax in your alluring owner's retreat, you'll enjoy being HOME! When the outdoors is calling your name, maintain a healthy lifestyle while walking to Wegmans, Aldi, TJ Maxx, CVS, Conte's Bike Shop, RowHouse and more. This home has classic white kitchen cabinets with a carrara marble quartz kitchen counter, plus our stunning gourmet kitchen appliances - including french door refrigerator! This particular end home is situation adjacent to the pool and clubhouse. Visit today to see why Saunders Station is one of Richmond's fastest selling communities! Nov/Dec 2019 closing.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 812 Azalea Ave! Updated throughout, this home is way too cute to miss! With gleaming hardwood floors you will appreciate the abundance of natural light that bathes the space. The bright renovated kitchen includes all new stainless steel appliances, flooring, new shaker cabinets, and butcher block countertops. The adjacent eat-in kitchen/dining space is perfect for entertaining. The primary bedroom with ensuite offers a nice retreat. The bathrooms have been completely updated with new vanities, fixtures, and a new shower/tub. The detached shed provides extra storage. Convenient to Northside Dog Park, Brookhill Azalea Shopping Center, Wawa, 1-95, restaurants and so much more.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome home to this charming 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath beauty in the heart of the Steveston neighborhood in Tuckahoe, Western Henrico!    Step inside and be greeted by gleaming hardwood floors and sun-drenched spaces that instantly make you feel at home. Freshly painted walls and brand-new carpeting add a bright, airy touch to the open-concept living and dining areas, creating the perfect space to gather and make memories. The updated kitchen is a true delight, featuring sleek stainless steel appliances (including a brand-new range!), plenty of cabinetry, and a cozy breakfast nook—your morning coffee just found its happy place!    Upstairs, you’ll find four generously sized bedrooms, including a spacious primary suite with an oversized walk-in closet and a dreamy ensuite boasting dual vanities, a soaking tub, and a standalone shower—hello, relaxation!    Step outside to your expansive backyard oasis, complete with a large deck perfect for entertaining and a handy storage shed. Plus, major updates like the roof, HVAC system, and water heater have been taken care of within the last five years—talk about peace of mind!    Nestled in an unbeatable location near Deep Run Park, fantastic restaurants, I-64, and more, this home is ready to welcome you. Schedule your tour today and fall in love!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 10121 Grand Oaks Dr —a well-appointed residence offering both comfort and convenience. The floorplan flows seamlessly together, offering flexibility and functionality in this light filled space. The kitchen features stainless appliances, upgraded granite countertops, ample cabinetry, and access to the freshly stained, spacious back deck, a perfect place to enjoy al fresco dining or your favorite book in the peaceful tree-lined yard. Additional updates include: new carpeting upstairs, new ceiling fans, NEW ROOF in 2020, fresh interior paint, and a re-sealed driveway. Residents can enjoy numerous nearby parks and trails, including Deep Run Park, which features extensive walking paths, open spaces, and recreational facilities. For shopping and dining, Costco, Sam's Club, Lowe's and a variety of restaurants are all within reach. Come see all this beautiful property has to offer!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Just off of Pemberton Road and near Three Chopt, Gaskins, I-64 and West Broad shopping/dining is a spacious well maintained home!  Hardwood floors grace much of the 1st level. The large great room has a fireplace and flows into a spacious kitchen w/ breakfast nook and newer stainless steel appliances including a refrigerator with ice/water dispenser. Upstairs, the master suite has a walk-in closet, his/her vanity, skylight and access to bedroom #4.  The other 3 rooms are spacious and connected by an open hallway with tall window over-looking the front yard. A beautiful deck overlooks the treed backyard and a spacious 2 car garage comes w/ remote door opener.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome Home! This Classic All-Brick Cape Cod Charmer Is Ready to Impress! Get ready to fall in love with this beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2-full-bath all-brick Cape Cod, ideally situated just minutes from both Downtown Richmond and Chesterfield County. This gem offers timeless curb appeal, modern updates, and the kind of warmth and character that makes a house truly feel like home. Step through the front door and you’ll immediately be greeted by gleaming wood floors that flow throughout much of the home, setting the stage for a space that blends classic charm with comfortable living. The spacious living room is anchored by a cozy wood-burning fireplace – the perfect spot to unwind with a good book or gather with friends on cool evenings. Just off the living room, you'll discover a delightful bonus: a fully screened-in side porch! The formal dining room offers a bright and inviting space to enjoy meals and entertain guests. Adjacent to the dining room is the kitchen, which is both functional and stylish. It features durable LVT flooring, granite countertops, a smooth-top electric range, a dishwasher, and plenty of cabinet space. A first-floor bedroom and full bath provide convenient main-level living—ideal for guests or a home office. Upstairs, you’ll find two generously sized bedrooms with gorgeous wood flooring and great closet space. A second full bathroom, with a newer vanity and contemporary lighting, serves the upstairs bedrooms. The backyard is a true outdoor oasis—perfect for pets, playtime, or summer barbecues. There’s even room for a garden or fire pit! This home offers the perfect blend of traditional craftsmanship and modern convenience, all in a location that can’t be beat. Enjoy easy access to major highways, parks, shopping, schools, and all the dining and cultural experiences that Richmond has to offer. If you’re looking for charm, comfort, and a location that keeps you connected to the best of both city and suburban living, this is the one you’ve been waiting for. Book your tour today!

dataSourceDisplay.dataSourceDescription: Central Virginia Regional Multiple Listing Service (CVRMLS)

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome home to this beautiful 3 Bedroom 2 Full bath all brick Cape conveniently located just minutes from Downtown Richmond and Chesterfield County. As soon as you walk in the door you will be greeted with gorgeous wood floors and a wood burning fireplace in the living room. Enjoy a relaxing evening on the attached fully screened side porch with your favorite beverage. Dining room, 1st floor bedroom and bath round out the living space on the first floor. The kitchen features smooth top electric range, dishwasher, granite countertops and LVT flooring. Huge utility room off the kitchen leads to the oversized, fully fenced backyard. Upstairs you will find 2 large bedrooms with wood flooring and ample storage space. You will also find another full bathroom upstairs that features a new vanity and lighting. New lighting and fresh paint round out all this property has to offer.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Beautifully maintained Rowhouse in the heart of Carytown. This 2 bedroom 1.5 bath charmer offers the perfect balance of historic appeal with all of the convenience of living two blocks from Cary Street. Stepping inside you are welcomed home by the warm feeling from all of the natural light pouring through the large windows throughout. The brick fireplace in the living room and hardwood floors throughout also add a touch of warmth and historic feel without sacrificing the clean lines and open feel you get from the more minimal molding and trim as well as the recessed lighting. The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, recessed lighting, and a large center island. The kitchen also offers a separate eat-in area with a large bay window looking out on the fully hardscaped back yard. Upstairs you will find two bedrooms and a full bath. The partially finished basement area provides plenty of additional living space as well. The backyard is an entertainer's dream, offering a fully fenced and secluded private patio area. Additionally there are two parking spaces out back offering you the option to park on Friday and not use your car until Monday morning. Schedule your tour today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this charming 1911-built semi-detached house located in the Chimborazo Park Neighborhood of Historic Church Hill. With a perfect blend of historic charm and modern convenience, this home offers a unique living experience. Step into the kitchen and be greeted by stainless steel appliances, a tasteful backsplash, and a separate eat-in area, creating a delightful space for cooking and gathering. The cozy living room seamlessly flows into the formal dining room, adorned with a gorgeous chandelier, perfect for hosting memorable dinner parties. Upstairs, you'll discover three generously sized bedrooms, each offering comfort and tranquility. Located just a few blocks from award winning restaurants and just minutes from the James River this location offers some of the best food and recreation options that Richmond has to offer. Don't miss the chance to tour this gem and witness the harmonious fusion of classic elegance and contemporary living. Book your tour today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Beautiful 3 bedroom, 1.5 bath 2-story all brick home in Church Hill with views of Chimborazo Park and walkable to popular restaurants and bakeries. Kitchen remodeled in 2016-17 with matching Samsung appliances, solid oak floors, custom cabinets with LED under cabinet lights, marble 3x9 tile backsplash, honed black granite countertops, Restoration Hardware lighting and Delta fixtures. Downstairs features 9+ ceilings and original hardwood floors, foyer with columns, formal dining room with fireplace with tile and cast iron insert. Living room also features a fireplace and leads to the kitchen or basement that holds laundry and is great for storage or work space. Upstairs contains master bedroom with large windows, transom above door and picture rail as well as two additional bedrooms with historic features. Full bath was remodeled in 2014 with porcelain hexagon mosaic floor tile, new vanity and new subway tile in shower and Delta fixtures. Outside features a front porch perfect for entertaining and a rear brick patio with planter boxes for herbs and greenery.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Affordable living just minutes from the city! This 1 bedroom condo boasts over 700 sqft of living space. Upon entry, you're greeted with a large living room which opens up to a private balcony with storage closet. The kitchen offers stainless appliances, granite counters, as well as ample cabinet space. A generous bedroom located down the hall presents two closets for even more storage and is adjacent to the full bathroom. Community amenities include a playground, swimming pool, and more! With easy access to shopping, I95, I64, and everything else the city has to offer, this one is sure to move fast. Come tour this gem!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this beautifully appointed 4-bedroom, 3-bath home in Richmond! Built in 2022, this home is ready for it's new owners. Inside, you'll find a soft, neutral color palette that creates a warm and inviting atmosphere. The modern kitchen boasts granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and stylish pendant lighting—perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. Durable hard surface flooring flows through the spacious living area, adding to the home’s charm. The primary suite offers a private retreat with an en suite bath and a generous walk-in closet. Step outside to enjoy the fenced-in backyard—ideal for relaxing evenings or weekend BBQs. Conveniently located just minutes from downtown Richmond, this move-in-ready gem is waiting for your personal touch!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 523 Pullbrooke Dr! This charming home offers a warm and inviting atmosphere with its light, updated luxury vinyl plank flooring that flows seamlessly throughout the space. Natural light fills every corner, from the living room to the open kitchen, creating a bright and airy feel. Step outside onto the back deck, where you can relax and take in the serenity of the private, tree-lined backyard. Conveniently located near schools, the North Chesterfield Road Library, a variety of dining and shopping options, parks, and more, this home is perfect for those seeking comfort and convenience.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Quaint Ranch-Style home in a desirable area is now on the market, and is waiting for you to call it home. This adorable 3 bedroom, 1 bath home features an eat-in kitchen with outside access to a paved driveway making bringing in the groceries easier. The paved driveway is wide enough to park two cars side by side. The kitchen also leads into the laundry room/mud room and out onto a spacious 16x12 deck. Enjoy sitting out on the deck facing a tree lined fenced in backyard. Master Bedroom has two closets for plenty of storage. Full bathroom has a closet to store your linens and bathroom supplies. Additional storage with outdoor shed. Minutes from Powhite Parkway, Chesterfield Towne Center on Midlothian. Professional pictures to come.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: A country feel but close to the city. This 3 bed 2 bath colonial is ready to be whatever you imagine. Situated on over half an acre, enjoy a huge backyard or there is the potential for dividing the parcel into 2 lots. The downstairs has a living room, den, large eat in kitchen, and potential for a full bathroom. Upstairs there are 3 bedrooms, a full bathroom, and an additional room that would make a great office. Interior columns and large windows add to the charm of this home. Priced to sell so don't miss out on this opportunity.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Priced to sell!!  Let your imagination run wild. This 2-story Colonial sits on one of the largest lots in the area at 0.65 Acres! Located on the edge of the city in one of RVA's fastest growing neighborhoods. Close to the highway. You've found a rare opportunity to customize over 2200 square ft of the 1900's most beautiful architecture. Features large interior columns, high ceilings, multiple fireplaces, original hardwood flooring, and other one-of-a kind features. The 3 Bedroom, 2 Full Bathroom with a Den/Luggage room home has a Bath on each level for convenience, large Eat-In-Kitchen, formal Living Room  &  Dining Room areas, large front porch, and oversized first floor windows to bring in optimal natural light. The land offers recently used In-ground Vegetable Garden, two large sheds, and plenty of room for a garage, maybe a F. R. O. G. ???  Endless possibilities to build and expand. Home is offered As-Is. Investors welcome!!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Stunning, brick-front transitional-style home in the sought after neighborhood of Covington! The gorgeous, formal foyer opens to a study/den complete w/ gas fireplace, elegant columns, &  2 exterior doors that lead to the private paver patio w/ ext. speakers! marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to your dream home in the Dominion Park section of Wyndham! This stunning 5-bedroom, 4.5-bathroom residence is a true gem, offering 3,252 square feet of modern luxury living, and it was built in 2021. From the moment you step inside, you'll be captivated by the open and bright floor plan which effortlessly connects the living, dining, and kitchen areas, making it perfect for entertaining or simply enjoying quality family time. The gourmet kitchen is a chef's delight, equipped with Kitchen-Aid appliances, beautiful cabinetry, and an expansive marble island for both casual dining and meal preparation. The main level also offers an added bedroom with full en-suite bath, perfect for remote work or a peaceful study space. Upstairs, you'll find a generous Primary Suite complete with a spa-like en-suite bathroom, as well as three additional well-appointed bedrooms as well as an open loft area. Dominion Park in Wyndham boasts an array of amenities, including walking trails, a clubhouse, swimming pool, and tennis courts in addition to being situated in award-winning school districts and conveniently located to retail, grocery , and major travel routes. Book your tour today!

Outside, the property features a large backyard with plenty of  space for outdoor activities and entertaining. Located just minutes away from Downtown as well dining, retail, groceries  and entertainment. Don't miss this opportunity to own a fully renovated home in South Richmond. Schedule a showing  today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This charming Cape Cod home offers nearly 2,000 square feet of living space, filled with natural light from the moment you step inside. French doors lead you into a cozy living room with a gas fireplace with electric insert and an airy dining room. Off the dining room, a sunroom or office with private access to the backyard serves as a peaceful retreat. The kitchen boasts ample storage and stainless steel appliances, while the main floor features a primary bedroom with an ensuite, a half bathroom, and a laundry room. As you head upstairs, you’ll find another convenient access to the backyard. On the second level, discover two spacious bedrooms, a full bathroom, and extra storage space. The large outdoor area is a blank canvas, perfect for your creative projects. Recent updates include new front stairs and landing, added cabinetry and a counter in the kitchen, extra cabinets in the laundry room, and a chain-link fence along part of the backyard with an additional temporary fence for flexibility. The solar panels are paid off. For outdoor enthusiasts, the Conservation Park of Virginia is less than five miles away, while wine lovers will enjoy River Dog Winery just six miles from home. Plus, easy access to I-295 and I-64 makes commuting a breeze. Schedule your tour today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Looking for character and plenty of space? Welcome home! This all brick  quad-level Transitional right in the heart of the Windsorview area of Willow Oaks has so much potential to offer. Just minutes from retail, highways and access to The James River this home offers the luxury of space without sacrificing convenience. This unique Mid - Century has had all of the "heavy lifting" done for you and  is ready for new owners to make it their own. Newly painted inside and out and all major systems have been replaced within the past 3 years. Inside you will enter into a large living area with natural hardwoods and a fireplace. Transition through the formal dining area with an attached screed in porch area perfect for entertaining or relaxing. Inside the kitchen you'll find new stainless appliances and a separate access. Traveling upstairs you will find three bedrooms and two full baths. And the top level is an additional loft/flex space. The lower level includes an additional living room with fireplace, a half bath, as well as a large laundry/ utility room. Situated on a corner lot and offering plenty of parking under the large carport this home offers plenty of space . Come tour!

Transition through the formal dining area with an attached screed in porch area perfect for entertaining or relaxing. Inside the kitchen you'll find new stainless appliances and a separate access. Traveling upstairs you will find three bedrooms and two full baths. And the top level is an additional loft/flex space. The lower level includes an additional living room with fireplace, a half bath, as well as a large laundry/ utility room. Situated on a corner lot and offering plenty of parking under the large carport this home offers plenty of space . Come tour!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Contemporary 2-story waterfront home with a private dock perfect for boating, fishing, and enjoying the peaceful reservoir views. While the home requires some TLC, it’s full of potential and is being sold as-is, making it an ideal opportunity for investors or families looking to create their dream waterfront retreat. Don’t miss this rare opportunity to own a piece of waterfront living with unlimited opportunities!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: 17 HOMES SOLD IN JUST 30 DAYS! Welcome to Little Creek - A charming community of 22 homesites around the corner from Meadowbrook High School. Beautiful homes set on spacious, wide lots. From the $290s! The Bramante 2 Story home has it all. Enter through the foyer or garage and head past the large flex room to the gourmet kitchen with oversized island. The adjoining dinette and family room are ideal gathering spaces, and a covered porch brings the outdoors in. The luxurious first-floor owner's suite features a tray ceiling for added elegance, along with a double bowl vanity and walk-in closet. An extra bedroom completes the first floor. Upstairs, another bedroom and loft offer a perfect guest suite. The Bramante 2 Story is a sight to behold.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Hold on to your jaw, because it's about to drop! Let's start in the kitchen because it is just amazing!!!!! Stunning center island, surrounded with custom cabinets, panel front side by side sub-zero refrigerator and freezer, 6 burner gas wolf range, and panel front cove dishwasher, all perfectly open to the huge family room with stone fireplace, hardwood floors, and the pool table ready for a game! Of course there are formal living and dining rooms and an additional family room perfect for play or office space! Upstairs you'll find the primary suite with two full baths (one with gas fireplace) and two walk in closets! Four additional spacious bedrooms and two fully renovated baths! Step outside onto the screen porch, enjoy the brick patio, or sit in the gazebo! The whole family will love the Sport Court, a central feature for fun! In addition to the large two car attached garage, you'll be excited to find an oversized two and a half car detached garage! All of this, perfectly situated on a 1.74 acre corner lot! Award winning Deep Run High school district too! Grab a spot for your showing today, this one won't last!!!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: KENSINGTON MEADOWS is back in Eastern Henrico! Featuring a brand new single-family home community off of Laburnum Avenue, convenient to I-64, I-295 and the White Oak Village shopping center! With a roomy floorplan and custom flex areas, The COLUMBIA is just as inviting as it is functional. The family room flows into the kitchen and dining area, so the conversation never stops. The kitchen boasts a huge island and features granite countertops and ALL stainless appliances! Add a covered porch for those warm summer nights and use the family entry to collect everyday mess. On the second floor, four large bedrooms await, with the option to change one to a cozy loft. Your owner’s suite offers a walk-in closet and luxurious bathroom. It’s all here - the homes in Kensington Meadows feature beautiful custom exteriors with partial stone or brick and sod  &  irrigation in the front  &  side yards!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Brand new construction from Center Creek Homes! Don’t miss your chance to tailor this home to your unique style and take advantage of the builder’s preferred lender incentive to get 5k back in closing costs! This home was designed with quality and context in mind. Blending perfectly into the historic fabric of the neighborhood, this 3 bedroom, 2.5 bath home has hardwood floors and granite countertops with your choice of finish, pendant lights, Shaker cabinets and tons of natural light! Centered around a large island, the kitchen has great flow and stainless appliances. The bright and open floor plan is a modern urban enthusiast’s delight. You will love the fantastic exterior living spaces as well, with a full front porch and spacious rear yard. Not to be overlooked is the peace of mind that comes with owning a newly built Center Creek Home, with thermal windows and doors, high-efficiency heating and cooling system, meticulous insulation and air-sealing, and modern, lowmaintenance materials. This home is conveniently located to Fuzzy Cactus, Black Hand Café Nostra, fantastic parks…a rare new home in a great old neighborhood!

This home is conveniently located to Fuzzy Cactus, Black Hand Café Nostra, fantastic parks…a rare new home in a great old neighborhood!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to Mason Yards — a new, 2-story condo community located in the center of Richmond's Scott's Addition neighborhood. Live Up in the heart of Charleston — where drinks with friends, food destinations, and endless entertainment are all within an easy walk. At a glance, this Charleston home features 3 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, an open floor plan, 1-car garage, and professionally designed interiors (featuring Carlton selections). On the main level, enjoy entertaining in your open, eat-in kitchen with quartz countertops, gray cabinets, and stainless steel appliances — all seamlessly connecting to your spacious family room, powder room, and coat closet. Upstairs, relax in your owner's suite with two, large walk-in closets and a private bathroom with upgraded tiled shower, dual sinks, and separate water closet. Two additional bedrooms — featuring spacious closets, and a shared hall bath. Lastly this home has a 14x5 balcony accessible through the 3rd bedroom  &  a laundry room complete this floor. With lawn care included, you'll have time back on your side! Stroll to your clubhouse or dog park! Move-in by: Spring 2024 Photos are not of actual home for sale.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: FINAL SECTION! ONE-LEVEL LIVING TOWNHOMES WITH SPACIOUS BACKYARDS FOR THOSE 55 AND BETTER! The Townes at Notting Place is Chesterfield's newest active-adult, low-maintenance community with desirable amenities including 2 miles of walking trails, a pavilion with picnic area, and a beautiful garden (great for those who are avid gardeners). This Oak home is a thoughtfully designed townhome featuring true-first floor living. Inside, you are greeted by a spacious open floor plan featuring a family room, cafe, laundry room, and kitchen with an oversized island and stainless appliances as well as a pocket office. The owner's suite includes two large walk-in closets and a private bath with a dual vanity. The second floor features an additional bedroom, loft, full bath, spacious closet. This home is complete with a rear patio and two-car garage. With the only 55+ townhome community with optional fenced-in backyards in Chesterfield for your furry friends, an ideal location, and a convenient home design, the Oak at Notting Place is the ideal place to call home. Call us today to learn more!  * Photos are of an existing model, not the actual home for sale.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to Park West – Comfortable Living in a Vibrant 55+ Community    Discover the perfect blend of comfort and convenience in this beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bath home located in the highly desirable Park West neighborhood. The spacious primary suite features a large walk-in closet and a private bathroom, offering a true retreat. The inviting family room, complete with a cozy gas fireplace, is perfect for relaxing evenings, while the formal dining room is ideal for hosting friends and family. Enjoy sunny afternoons in the bright Florida Room or step out to the rear patio for fresh air and outdoor living. The home also boasts a 2-car garage, providing plenty of storage and convenience. Living in Park West means more than just a beautiful home — it’s a lifestyle. Residents enjoy exceptional amenities, including a swimming pool, a clubhouse with an exercise room, library, and a fully equipped kitchen, creating endless opportunities for recreation and community connection. Experience low-maintenance living in a welcoming neighborhood designed for active adults. This home is ready for you to move in and start your next chapter.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to Park West – Comfortable Living in a Vibrant 55+ Community    Discover the perfect blend of comfort and convenience in this beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bath home located in the highly desirable Park West neighborhood. The spacious primary suite features a large walk-in closet and a private bathroom, offering a true retreat. The inviting family room, complete with a cozy gas fireplace, is perfect for relaxing evenings, while the formal dining room is ideal for hosting friends and family. Enjoy sunny afternoons in the bright Florida Room or step out to the rear patio for fresh air and outdoor living. The home also boasts a 2-car garage, providing plenty of storage and convenience. Living in Park West means more than just a beautiful home — it’s a lifestyle. Residents enjoy exceptional amenities, including a swimming pool, a clubhouse with an exercise room, library, and a fully equipped kitchen, creating endless opportunities for recreation and community connection. Experience low-maintenance living in a welcoming neighborhood designed for active adults. This home is ready for you to move in and start your next chapter.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: *  * Builder Incentive - 5k in closing costs assistance with builder's preferred lender *  *  Don't miss your opportunity for BRAND NEW construction in sought after Church Hill just a few blocks from the new market on 25th, VCU, downtown and popular restaurants/coffee shops. Finely crafted by Center Creek Homes, this home incorporates many period elements to fit perfectly into the surrounding historic fabric while offering the closet space, open concept, and efficiencies for comfortable and luxurious urban living. Tons of natural light and 9' ceilings make this home spacious and bright. Get ahead of the curve and lock this one in before building starts, and work with our team to tailor your new home to fit your unique style. The island kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, white shaker cabinets, and purchaser’s choice of stone counter and backsplash. The master has a walk-in closet and a beautiful en suite bathroom with a luxury shower showcasing purchaser’s choice of tile. Don’t let this one slip away  * This home is to be built. Pictures depicted are of a completed home with the same floorplan and standard finish package. *

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Beautifully designed to have the look and feel of an older home but with all the modern smart conveniences! Some great mechanical features include 15seer variable speed heat pump, conditioned crawl spaces and more. Interior features include hardwood and tile floors throughout, 9FT ceiling downstairs, crown molding downstairs, tall wainscoting in dining room and chair rail in powder room! Laundry is located on the second floor. There is a Ring smart doorbell, Nest smart thermostat, security system (with a 2nd keypad in the owners suite) and a touchpad deadbolt on the front door. Large living and dining rooms with wide openings to create good flow. Large eat in kitchen with tile floors, granite countertops, tile backsplash, can lights and SS Appliances. Outdoor features include two Full covered front porches AND two awesome covered 8ft deep rear porches with tiled floors, a large paver patio and fenced in backyard with drive gate accessing rear paved alley

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: GRAND OPENING OF NEWEST HENRICO TOWNHOME COMMUNITY - GROVE POINT! Lots of living space and an abundance of natural light make the Beethoven a townhome that feels like a single-family home. On the main level, a huge Kitchen, with island and all SS Appliances, plus Fridge, provides plenty of room for cooking and entertaining and opens to a large airy Living Room with a powder room. Upstairs are two spacious bedrooms with ample closet space, a hall bath, and a generous Owner’s Bedroom that features a tray ceiling and a huge walk-in closet. The private Owner’s Bath features a 5’ shower with dual showerheads! The Beethoven features a finished basement with a huge recreation room, with 3 piece plumbing rough-in and spacious storage area. Enjoy hosting nights outdoor on your 10 x 10 patio.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Newly constructed homes in Historic Church Hill are few and far between, and you don’t want to miss this one! This home was thoughtfully crafted by Center Creek Homes to mesh into the historic fabric of the neighborhood while offering all of the amenities of modern living. You’ll love the efficiencies and low maintenance of new appliances, durable HardiePlank siding and Energy Star® windows. Upgraded moldings and hardwood floors flow throughout the open and airy floorplan. The large chef's kitchen offers TONS of counter space, white Shaker cabinets, gas cooking and black stainless steel appliances. Large bar-style seating opposite the formal dining space and family room make this home perfect for entertaining. Upstairs, all bedrooms are spacious and bright. The owner’s suite has not one, but two spacious walk-in closets and a luxury en suite bathroom with double vanity and luxury tile shower. This home also offers great outdoor space with a detached two-car garage, and is only a few blocks from Chimborazo Park, Alewife, Metzger, and other neighborhood favorites! Make this home yours before construction begins and select finishes tailored to your style!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: QUICK MOVE-IN HOME - SPRING DELIVERY! Welcome to Mason Yards — a new, 2-story condo community located in the center of Richmond's Scott's Addition neighborhood. Live Up in the heart of Charleston — where drinks with friends, food destinations, and endless entertainment are all within an easy walk. At a glance, this Charleston home features 3 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, an open floor plan, 1-car garage, and professionally designed interiors (featuring Summit selections). On the main level, enjoy entertaining in your open, eat-in kitchen with quartz countertops, gray cabinets, and stainless steel appliances — all seamlessly connecting to your spacious family room, powder room, and coat closet. Upstairs, relax in your owner's suite with two, large walk-in closets and a private bathroom with upgraded tiled shower, dual sinks, and separate water closet. One additional bedroom — with a walk-in closet, loft, hall bath, and a laundry room complete this floor. Move-in by: Spring 2023 Photos are not of actual home for sale.

(One block to Gayton Elementry School) MasterBd/sitting area with working Gas Fireplace, Step down into spacious Family Rm w/ built in BookCases, and Gas Fireplace. Wonderful Kitchen with bar/seating. Sun Rm, Dining Rm open to Fantastic Screen Porch and Deck, all overlooking beautiful Pool and landscaped, lighted yard. Exposed aggregate Driveway and Huge off street Parking area, 5 Cars, plus 2 car garage. You Gotta See it!!!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Come check out this 3 bedrooms 1.5 bath house in Highland Springs Va. It has been loved by the seller for over 40 years with quiet neighbors and large front and back yard for gardening. This home is conveniently located just 5 minutes from the Richmond International Airport, 3 minutes to I-295 and I-64 access and Historic Richmond museum and local restaurants and shopping. The house is in walking distance to the High School. Enjoy a peaceful morning in the large sunroom at the back of the house with through the entrance off the kitchen. Home is priced very affordably to factor in some wiggle room for you to make it even better suit your needs. While it needs a little TLC it is a great home and everything is in  working order and ready for you to move in. Seller replaced the roof in 2018.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: TOWNHOMES WITH PRIVATE WOODED HOMESITES AND 2-CAR GARAGES IN SHORT PUMP! Saunders Station Townes offers homes in a private and convenient location above the hustle and bustle, yet close to major shops, restaurants, and markets (including Wegmans). The Grayson features a modern open floorplan with seamless kitchen, dining and family living spaces. Host family gatherings and make merry with friends in your open kitchen with easy access to your maintenance free composite deck. And yes you CAN grill! Kick back and relax in the spacious owner’s suite outfitted with two walk-in closets and a Roman shower and double vanity. Looking for more space? Craving more outdoors? Upgraded 4th floor loft featuring an open sky terrace! Wooded homesites available as well! Nearby, you’ll find desirable amenities including a private park, pool, on-demand spin studio, playground and more!  * Photos are not of actual home for sale

We welcome you to customize this plan to personalize your home!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Incredible combination of style, location, and convenience, this FIRST FLOOR condo within walking distance to both Libbie Grove and Carytown has it all. The kitchen has been upgraded with all new LG Stainless Steel appliances (gas cooking)  to go with the granite countertops, granite tile backsplash, and ample cabinet space. Crown and Chair molding highlight the dining area which opens to the living room complete with custom window treatments and Hunter Douglas UV Protection blinds. The primary bedroom includes a nice sized closet with added shelving, custom blinds, and the attached bath has custom cabinets for more storage. The Second Bedroom (also perfect for a home office) is next to the second full bathroom, and the stack washer/dryer is just down the hall. Lock Lane has an amazing heated pool and outdoor picnic/grill area, and both are STEPS AWAY from this unit's private rear entrance through the kitchen. This building is also the only one in the complex to have basement bicycle storage for the residents. All exterior maintenance, pool, water, sewer, trash removal and snow removal are included in the condo fee. The location can't be beat for the community, and for this condo!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Delightful, cozy home has gas log fireplace that will light up your hearth this winter. Simple one level living complete with community pool, clubhouse with exercise center; convenient to Short Pump Town Center, with quick access to Rt. 64, and Rt. 288.  Easy access to shopping, libraries, schools, universities and historic Downtown Richmond. Priced to sell quickly, so don't dawdle. Monthly fee includes all exterior maintenance; water; sewer; trash removal; snow removal; clubhouse and the pool! The Master bedroom has a walk-in closet and master bath with cathedral ceiling. Storage is no problem with plenty of closets, kitchen cabinets; an over sized 2 car garage with an attic accessed by pull down ladder. Front private patio has potential for your inner gardener. YOU MUST SEE THIS TODAY!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Absolute perfection! This stunning upper-level CORNER UNIT condo has all the amazing upgrades you would expect in a Former Model, in an ideal location with unobscured sweeping views! This Truxton floor plan by Stanley Martin is an impressive Open floor plan, perfect for entertaining, with flex areas for dining or extra seating for ultimate versatility! You’ll love the Luxury Vinyl Tile flooring throughout the main level, enhanced by Recessed lighting, tons of Natural light, and amazing views from the charming built-in Window Seat! The Chef’s Kitchen boasts beautiful White Cabinetry with Granite Countertops and 8’ Center Island with Seating, Glass Subway Tile Backsplash and Stainless Appliances with Range Hood, Wall Oven and Cooktop, and Modern Chandeliers! Upstairs you’ll find 2 bedrooms and a full bath, plus a huge Master Suite with an oversized Walk-in closet and a luxurious Dual Vanity Ensuite Bath with Tile shower, Frameless Shower Doors, Granite Vanity Tops, Custom Wall Paper and Decorative Framed Mirrors! Low Maintenance Living in Short Pump with 1 car garage and quick commutes to I-288 and I-64. Amenities include a Pool, Fitness center, Clubhouse, Playground, and Dog park!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This home is the former Stanley Martin Model, and features many luxurious upgrades and a prime location! The Truxton plan is  a 3-bedroom, 2 1/2 bath, upper-level home that's truly one of a kind. The open-architecture design of The Truxton is impressive. When you enter the main level, the expansive kitchen with island, dining room, and family room areas open to each other to provide a continuous view from the front of the home to the back, which is helpful whether you're hosting an intimate dinner party or large gathering. The balcony off the kitchen gives you even more space for entertaining or just enjoying a quiet spot outside to watch the sunset. Hands down, a dream kitchen (with an 8' island), makes cooking or entertaining fun in this inviting space. Make your way upstairs and you'll find 3 bedrooms, including a spacious owner's suite retreat, with an even more spacious walk-in closet. A convenient bedroom-level laundry room takes the chore out of doing the laundry. The 1-car garage offers convenient attached parking, plus extra space for storage. Saunders Station is located in Short Pump, close to shopping, dining, entertainment and Blue Ribbon schools. Make this your home today!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: This adorable ranch style home with three bedrooms and two full baths is within walking distance of the James River and walking trails. Chefs kitchen with open beamed ceiling, and a good sized eat in area. Hardwood floors throughout most of the house. Other rooms include a bright, light living room/den and a cozy library as well as a room that currently serves as a home office. Fenced in back yard with stone patio, fire pit and mature plantings provide a beautiful outdoor sanctuary . Situated on almost a half acre.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: North Chesterfield's premier community with pool, clubhouse  &  more! Our final release of homesites are some of the best in the community - you'll love these new private cul-de-sacs lots! The Allegheny single-family home allow today’s families to easily spend time together or spread out. The convenient family entry off the 2-car garage controls clutter. The inviting family room opens to the dining area and gourmet kitchen, so entertaining is easy. Extend the living space outdoors with an optional covered porch. Upstairs you'll find four bedrooms, or three bedrooms and a loft for more gathering space. Your luxury owner's suite comes complete with a walk-in closet and double vanity bath. Come see all The Allegheny has to offer.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to 8151 Provincetown Drive. This brick-front townhouse in sought-after Providence Green offers low exterior maintenance, includes lawn care and a convenient location close to major interstates, great shopping and popular restaurants. It has three bedrooms and a bath and a half. On the first floor you will be welcomed by a large living room, nice sized half bath, an updated galley kitchen, laundry area, dining room / family room with sliding glass doors to a private back yard. Upstairs there are two large bedrooms, full bath and a third bedroom or office. Call today to see how you might be able to own this great home for less than renting.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: The GENOA is a beautiful floorplan. This home features a beautiful exterior and 2-car garage! Enter into the front door and the foyer is spacious and there is a formal dining room! Continue into the huge great room that flows seamlessly into the kitchen and dinette. The kitchen, with it's huge island, granite countertops, and ALL stainless steel appliances, is truly a gourmet dream! The first floor owner's suite is tucked off of the great room and features a beautiful tray ceiling, walk in closet, and private bathroom with shower and soaking tub! Upstairs, there are 2 bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, and spacious loft! Bed#2 has it's own private bathroom. The design interior package is upgraded to the AMHERST!

MLS of The Roanoke Valley

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Nestled in  Boones Mill, VA, this 20-acre expanse  offers a pastoral dream. Prime bottomland unfurls a canvas of agricultural opportunity, ideal for cultivating corn, soybeans, hay, or a variety of row crops. The land whispers the promise of growth and abundance, with the serene Magoddee Creek tracing a portion of the boundary, offering a tranquil soundtrack to your rural retreat. This fertile tract is not just soil and water; it's a chance to connect with the earth, to watch your efforts bloom under the Virginia sun. Whether you envision a bustling pasture or a quiet field of grains swaying in the breeze, this land is ready to bring your vision to life. Embrace the opportunity to cultivate, or simply be , where the land is rich, the water is plentiful, and the possibilities are endless.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Cute house in good condition. Furnace new in March 2006. Roof new in Aug 2007. Hot water heater new in Nov 2008. Exterior painted in Aug 2008. Backyard is a gardener's paradise - wonderful flower beds, periennials, and a fish pond. Shed nice for tools, potting, stuff. 1-car garage no longer used for that purpose. Multi-level deck overlooks fenced yard. Inside, the brick fireplace - never used by current owner - has woodstove. Flanked by bookcase. Downstairs has central air. Upstairs can be finished with ease. GREAT location. Walk to Lewis Ginter Botanical Gardens and Belmont Golf Course. Bike to Bryan Park.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Looking for a great value in the west end of Henrico?  Look no more!  Come check with awesome 3 bedroom, 3 bath townhouse in Lexington Village!  This home features 3 bedrooms with in-suite full baths, including a first-floor primary, and two upstairs bedrooms. Features include newly painted rooms, new flooring on the first floor, a new hot water heater, kitchen appliances about five years old, and a washer, dryer, and refrigerator that convey!  It also features newer vinyl windows, a nicely quiet backyard, an attached storage area, and two dedicated parking spaces. The location is awesome, with quick proximity to I-64 and I-295, close to Innsbrook and all the services that the West Broad and Short Pump corridors have to offer. Home is located in the Glen Allen High School district. *  * Back on the market due to no fault of the seller *  *
