marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Immaculate end unit in a sought after location!! Absolutely beautiful layout. The first floor master with is spacious and has attached master bath. The 2 bedrooms upstairs with 2 closets and ceiling fans each have their own bathrooms! Cozy family room with fireplace (electric logs) looks out to a great size back yard. Dining room has hardwood floors and pretty bronze chandelier. Eat in kitchen is renovated and has granite countertops and new stainless steel appliances that convey. Washer and dryer also convey. Other wonderful features are new Pella and Window World windows throughout, new blinds, 9 ft ceilings on first floor, crown molding in living room and dining roon, front storm door, back storm door leading to nice deck in backyard, plenty of storage. This is an awesome home and will not last!!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: ONE-LEVEL LIVING TOWNHOMES WITH SPACIOUS BACKYARDS FOR THOSE 55 AND BETTER! The Townes at Notting Place is Chesterfield's newest active-adult, low-maintenance community with desirable amenities including 2 miles of walking trails, a pavilion with picnic area, and a beautiful garden(great for those who are avid gardeners). Pull into your two-car garage at your new Holly townhome, and be greeted by a spacious open floor plan featuring a family room, cafe, and kitchen with an oversized island and stainless appliances. Retire to your spacious owner's suite which includes a private owner's bath with dual vanities and a dual walk-in closets with convenient access to your laundry room. When guests are in town, set them up in the secondary bedroom with an adjacent bath. Need more space? Relax upstairs in the loft! This home is complete with a 2-car garage and covered patio. With the only 55+ townhome community with optional fenced-in backyards in Chesterfield for your furry friends, an ideal location, and a convenient home design, the Holly at Notting Place is the ideal place to call home. Call us today to learn more! * Photos are of an existing model, not the actual home for sale

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: TOWNHOME IS NOT YET BUILT. Located in Glen Allen's newest Master-Planned Community - River Mill was awarded Richmond's first Active RVA Certification community for creating a culture that encourages healthy lifestyles. Whether that is walking or biking the natural trails, strolling along the sidewalks around the community, enjoying the clubhouse, pool, play area or even taking in the breath-taking view of the Chickahominy River, this community offers the perfect combination of calmness and convenience. Located close to I-95, I-295 as well as shopping and dining, homebuyers have quick access to everything they need! Make your appointment now to learn more about this amazing new community. (Photo is from builder's library and shown as an example only; colors, features and options will vary. )

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: The BEETHOVEN is a beautiful floorplan. This home features a beautiful partial stone exterior. Enter into the light filled foyer and there is a convenient powder room. Continue into the spacious great room that flows seamlessly into the kitchen. The kitchen boasts a large island, all stainless appliances w/ fridge, upgraded cabinetry, pendant lighting, gas cooking, and a sliding glass door onto a rear patio. Upstairs, there are 3 bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, and laundry room with GE washer  &  dryer. The owner's suite boasts a large closet and private bathroom with large shower. Attic storage has been added. The design interior package is the BRISTOL!

Enter into the light filled foyer and there is a convenient powder room. Continue into the spacious great room that flows seamlessly into the kitchen. The kitchen boasts a large island, all stainless appliances w/ fridge, upgraded cabinetry, pendant lighting, gas cooking, and a sliding glass door onto a rear patio. Upstairs, there are 3 bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, and laundry room with GE washer  &  dryer. The owner's suite boasts a large closet and private bathroom with large shower. Attic storage has been added. The design interior package is the BRISTOL!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Adorable! This well maintained cape home nestled on a corner lot entering onto a cul-de-sac street is a MUST SEE. Feel a country setting with an open and airy kitchen/living room concept. Snuggle with loved ones next to the wood burning stove, enjoy the recessed lighting as well as the 1st Floor Master. The roof is less than 2 years old, HVAC Trane unit 5 years old, washer and dryer less than 1 year, all with a transferrable warranty to the new owner. The outdoor cedar planks have recently been replaced with a fresh coat of paint. All appliances convey.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Introducing the new single-family home design, The Alden! Boasting desired features and modern conveniences, this stunning home is perfect for homebuyers seeking a comfortable and stylish living space. With a formal dining room, chef-inspired kitchen, and adjoining family room and dining area, the main level provides the ideal setting for hosting unforgettable gatherings. You'll appreciate the convenience of a main-level study. The upper level is equally impressive, with an oversized primary bedroom featuring a spa-inspired bath and dual walk-in closets. Two additional generously sized bedrooms with walk-in closets provide ample space for loved ones to unwind and relax.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Fantastic 4 bedroom 2 bath cape in nice and convenient location. 5 minutes to 288/Powhite. Great value for a 4 bedroom home with Chesterfield County award-winning schools. Home features large bedrooms with 1st or 2nd floor master possibility. Wood floors have just been refinished. New kitchen floor. 2nd floor of home has never been lived in. Shaded and private backyard partially fenced with two-tiered back deck. Oversized driveway easily fits 2 cars across. Exterior painted within last year and many rooms inside freshly painted. Heat pump is 3 years old and water heater 2 years old. Sellers are offering a 1 year home warranty and $1,500 in closing costs. All appliances convey! Quick closing possible.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: The Williams Townes, four inviting new townhomes on N Street in the heart of rapidly evolving Church Hill North, pay homage to Richmond’s historic aesthetic while providing the ease of today’s modern lifestyle. The energy efficient 3100+ SF homes with designer finishes throughout feature 4 bedrooms 3.5 baths with two additional flex rooms to use in ways that suit your family best. First floor offers perfect AirBnB or in-law suite options, or additional media/game room for your family, with two flex rooms, full bath, kitchenette and separate entrance. Second floor combines large, open kitchen, dining, living space opening to a deck, an additional living room or office and a hall half bath. A luxury master suite, two more bedrooms and full hall bath comprise the third floor. Enjoy life in this supremely walkable neighborhood, just blocks from The Roosevelt, Dutch  &  Co. , Sub Rosa  &  WPA Bakeries, Proper Pie and more. Shared off-street parking, easy access to 95/64/195. Relish the best of both worlds – vibrant city living in a newly constructed home with all the amenities.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: GRAND OPENING OF NEWEST HENRICO TOWNHOME COMMUNITY - GROVE POINT! Designed with today’s homebuyers in mind, the ODESSA features a convenient and timeless elegance behind a traditional façade. A large foyer welcomes you, and the beautifully appointed family room provides plenty of space. A dining area off the kitchen offers convenience, with an oversized island to make every cook happy! Ascend the rear staircase to the second floor featuring three bedrooms, including an owner’s bedroom with an enormous walk-in closet. The owner’s bath has a double bowl vanity and a linen closet. A second floor laundry provides the ultimate in convenience, and the large closets in each the of the bedrooms and the hallway linen closet provide plenty of storage space. Enjoy hosting nights outdoor on your 10 x 10 patio.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: The Margaret is an exquisite home that boasts a spacious floor plan and upscale features. One standout feature is the large kitchen island, which provides ample counter space for meal preparation and doubles as a convenient breakfast bar. The gourmet kitchen is equipped with top-of-the-line appliances and high-end finishes, making cooking and entertaining a breeze. The morning room is a perfect spot to enjoy a cup of coffee while taking in the beautiful surroundings. The basement of the home offers additional space for relaxation and recreation with its spacious recreation room, den, and full bathroom. The guest bathroom is outfitted with dual sinks to accommodate multiple guests comfortably. With a fifth bedroom and a deck off the main level, there is plenty of room for family and guests to spread out and enjoy all that The Margaret has to offer.

The gourmet kitchen is equipped with top-of-the-line appliances and high-end finishes, making cooking and entertaining a breeze. The morning room is a perfect spot to enjoy a cup of coffee while taking in the beautiful surroundings. The basement of the home offers additional space for relaxation and recreation with its spacious recreation room, den, and full bathroom. The guest bathroom is outfitted with dual sinks to accommodate multiple guests comfortably. With a fifth bedroom and a deck off the main level, there is plenty of room for family and guests to spread out and enjoy all that The Margaret has to offer.
